import React, { useState } from "react";
import { Chart as ChartJS, CategoryScale, LinearScale, BarElement, Tooltip, Legend, ArcElement } from "chart.js";
import { Bar } from "react-chartjs-2";
import { useFetch, fmt, fmtDate, avatarColor } from "../hooks";
import { api, exportCSV } from "../api";
import { Spinner, Empty } from "../components";
import type { DailyActivity, HourlyActivity, TopChannel, TopUser } from "../types";

ChartJS.register(CategoryScale, LinearScale, BarElement, Tooltip, Legend, ArcElement);

const CHART_OPTS = {
  responsive: true,
  maintainAspectRatio: false,
  animation: false as const,
  plugins: { legend: { display: false } },
  scales: {
    x: { grid: { display: false }, ticks: { color: "rgba(235,235,245,0.3)", font: { size: 9 } } },
    y: { grid: { color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)" }, ticks: { color: "rgba(235,235,245,0.3)", font: { size: 10 } } },
  },
};

interface ContentTypes { text_only: number; with_attachment: number; with_embed: number; with_sticker: number; total: number }
interface MediaType { media_type: string; cnt: number }
interface MsgSize { avg_chars: number; median_chars: number; p95_chars: number; max_chars: number; empty_count: number; total: number }

function StatMini({ label, value, color }: { label: string; value: string | number; color: string }) {
  return (
    <div style={{ textAlign: "center", padding: "12px 8px" }}>
      <div style={{ fontSize: 22, fontWeight: 800, color, fontVariantNumeric: "tabular-nums", letterSpacing: "-0.8px" }}>
        {typeof value === "number" ? fmt(value) : value}
      </div>
      <div style={{ fontSize: 9, fontWeight: 700, textTransform: "uppercase", letterSpacing: ".6px", color: "var(--t4)", marginTop: 4 }}>
        {label}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

export function Analytics() {
  const [days, setDays] = useState(30);

  const { data: act, loading: aL } = useFetch<DailyActivity[]>(() => api.db.ch.activity(days) as Promise<DailyActivity[]>, [days]);
  const { data: hr, loading: hL } = useFetch<HourlyActivity[]>(() => api.db.ch.hourly() as Promise<HourlyActivity[]>);
  const { data: tch, loading: tL } = useFetch<TopChannel[]>(() => api.db.ch.topChannels(10) as Promise<TopChannel[]>);
  const { data: tu, loading: uL } = useFetch<TopUser[]>(() => api.db.ch.topUsers(20) as Promise<TopUser[]>);
  const { data: ct, loading: ctL } = useFetch<ContentTypes>(() => api.db.ch.contentTypes(days) as Promise<ContentTypes>, [days]);
  const { data: mt, loading: mtL } = useFetch<MediaType[]>(() => api.db.ch.mediaTypes(days) as Promise<MediaType[]>, [days]);
  const { data: ms, loading: msL } = useFetch<MsgSize>(() => api.db.ch.msgSize(days) as Promise<MsgSize>, [days]);

  const dayBtns = (
    <div className="panel-actions">
      {[7, 30, 90].map(d => (
        <button key={d} className={`btn btn-sm ${days === d ? "btn-primary" : "btn-secondary"}`} onClick={() => setDays(d)}>
          {d}g
        </button>
      ))}
    </div>
  );

  return (
    <div className="page-enter">
      {/* Row 1: Daily activity + Hourly */}
      <div className="grid-2" style={{ marginBottom: 14 }}>
        <div className="panel">
          <div className="panel-head">
            <span className="panel-title">Günlük Aktivite</span>
            {dayBtns}
            {act && <button className="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" onClick={() => exportCSV(act as unknown as Record<string, unknown>[], "activity")}>CSV</button>}
          </div>
          <div className="chart-wrap" style={{ height: 200 }}>
            {aL ? <div className="empty"><Spinner /></div> : !act?.length ? <Empty /> :
              <Bar data={{
                labels: act.map(r => fmtDate(r.date)),
                datasets: [
                  { label: "Mesaj", data: act.map(r => Number(r.messages)), backgroundColor: "rgba(10,132,255,0.6)", borderRadius: 3, borderSkipped: false },
                  { label: "Kullanıcı", data: act.map(r => Number(r.users)), backgroundColor: "rgba(48,209,88,0.5)", borderRadius: 3, borderSkipped: false },
                ],
              }} options={{ ...CHART_OPTS, plugins: { legend: { display: true, labels: { color: "rgba(235,235,245,0.6)", font: { size: 10 } } } } }} />}
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="panel">
          <div className="panel-head"><span className="panel-title">Saate Göre Dağılım</span></div>
          <div className="chart-wrap" style={{ height: 200 }}>
            {hL ? <div className="empty"><Spinner /></div> : !hr?.length ? <Empty /> :
              <Bar data={{
                labels: Array.from({ length: 24 }, (_, i) => i + ":00"),
                datasets: [{
                  label: "Mesaj",
                  data: Array.from({ length: 24 }, (_, i) => { const r = hr.find(h => Number(h.hour) === i); return r ? Number(r.messages) : 0; }),
                  backgroundColor: "rgba(191,90,242,0.55)", borderRadius: 3, borderSkipped: false,
                }],
              }} options={CHART_OPTS} />}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Row 2: Content types + Media types + Msg size */}
      <div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "1fr 1fr 1fr", gap: 14, marginBottom: 14 }}>
        {/* Content type distribution */}
        <div className="panel">
          <div className="panel-head"><span className="panel-title">İçerik Türü Dağılımı</span></div>
          <div style={{ padding: "12px 16px" }}>
            {ctL ? <div className="empty" style={{ height: 100 }}><Spinner /></div> : !ct ? <Empty /> : (
              <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 8 }}>
                {[
                  { label: "Sadece metin", value: Number(ct.text_only), color: "var(--blue)" },
                  { label: "Attachment", value: Number(ct.with_attachment), color: "var(--green)" },
                  { label: "Embed", value: Number(ct.with_embed), color: "var(--purple)" },
                  { label: "Sticker", value: Number(ct.with_sticker), color: "var(--orange)" },
                ].map(item => {
                  const pct = ct.total > 0 ? Math.round((item.value / Number(ct.total)) * 100) : 0;
                  return (
                    <div key={item.label}>
                      <div style={{ display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", fontSize: 11, marginBottom: 3 }}>
                        <span style={{ color: "var(--t2)" }}>{item.label}</span>
                        <span style={{ color: item.color, fontWeight: 700, fontFamily: "var(--mono)" }}>{fmt(item.value)} ({pct}%)</span>
                      </div>
                      <div style={{ height: 4, background: "var(--g1)", borderRadius: 2, overflow: "hidden" }}>
                        <div style={{ height: "100%", width: `${pct}%`, background: item.color, borderRadius: 2, transition: "width .6s ease" }} />
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  );
                })}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Media types */}
        <div className="panel">
          <div className="panel-head"><span className="panel-title">Medya Türü</span></div>
          <div style={{ padding: "12px 16px" }}>
            {mtL ? <div className="empty" style={{ height: 100 }}><Spinner /></div> : !mt?.length ? <Empty /> : (
              <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 6 }}>
                {mt.slice(0, 8).map((m, i) => {
                  const maxCnt = Number(mt[0]?.cnt ?? 1);
                  const pct = maxCnt > 0 ? Math.round((Number(m.cnt) / maxCnt) * 100) : 0;
                  const colors = ["var(--blue)", "var(--green)", "var(--purple)", "var(--orange)", "var(--teal)", "var(--red)", "var(--yellow)", "var(--pink)"];
                  return (
                    <div key={m.media_type} style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 8 }}>
                      <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--t3)", minWidth: 55, fontFamily: "var(--mono)" }}>{m.media_type || "none"}</span>
                      <div style={{ flex: 1, height: 4, background: "var(--g1)", borderRadius: 2, overflow: "hidden" }}>
                        <div style={{ height: "100%", width: `${pct}%`, background: colors[i % colors.length], borderRadius: 2 }} />
                      </div>
                      <span style={{ fontSize: 10, color: "var(--t2)", fontFamily: "var(--mono)", minWidth: 50, textAlign: "right" }}>{fmt(m.cnt)}</span>
                    </div>
                  );
                })}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Message size stats */}
        <div className="panel">
          <div className="panel-head"><span className="panel-title">Mesaj Boyutu</span></div>
          {msL ? <div className="empty" style={{ height: 100 }}><Spinner /></div> : !ms ? <Empty /> : (
            <div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "1fr 1fr", gap: 0 }}>
              <StatMini label="Ortalama" value={`${fmt(ms.avg_chars)} kr`} color="var(--blue)" />
              <StatMini label="Medyan" value={`${fmt(ms.median_chars)} kr`} color="var(--green)" />
              <StatMini label="P95" value={`${fmt(ms.p95_chars)} kr`} color="var(--orange)" />
              <StatMini label="Maks" value={`${fmt(ms.max_chars)} kr`} color="var(--red)" />
              <StatMini label="Boş mesaj" value={ms.empty_count} color="var(--t3)" />
              <StatMini label="Toplam" value={ms.total} color="var(--t2)" />
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Row 3: Top channels + Top users */}
      <div className="grid-2">
        <div className="panel">
          <div className="panel-head">
            <span className="panel-title">Top Kanallar</span>
            {tch && <button className="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" onClick={() => exportCSV(tch as unknown as Record<string, unknown>[], "top-ch")}>CSV</button>}
          </div>
          {tL ? <div className="empty" style={{ padding: 30 }}><Spinner /></div> : !tch?.length ? <Empty /> :
            <table>
              <thead><tr><th>#</th><th>Kanal</th><th>Mesaj</th><th>Kullanıcı</th></tr></thead>
              <tbody>
                {tch.map((c, i) => (
                  <tr key={c.channel_id}>
                    <td style={{ color: "var(--t3)", fontSize: 11 }}>{i + 1}</td>
                    <td className="mono" style={{ color: "var(--blue)", fontSize: 11 }}>{c.channel_id}</td>
                    <td className="num" style={{ color: "var(--yellow)" }}>{fmt(c.msg_count)}</td>
                    <td>{fmt(c.unique_users)}</td>
                  </tr>
                ))}
              </tbody>
            </table>}
        </div>

        <div className="panel">
          <div className="panel-head">
            <span className="panel-title">Top Kullanıcılar</span>
            {tu && <button className="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" onClick={() => exportCSV(tu as unknown as Record<string, unknown>[], "top-users")}>CSV</button>}
          </div>
          {uL ? <div className="empty" style={{ padding: 30 }}><Spinner /></div> : !tu?.length ? <Empty /> :
            tu.map((u, i) => (
              <div key={u.author_id} style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 10, padding: "8px 14px", borderBottom: "1px solid var(--b0)" }}>
                <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--t3)", width: 18, textAlign: "right" }}>{i + 1}</span>
                <div style={{ width: 26, height: 26, borderRadius: "50%", background: avatarColor(u.author_id), display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 700, color: "#fff" }}>
                  {(u.author_name?.[0] || "?").toUpperCase()}
                </div>
                <div style={{ flex: 1, minWidth: 0 }}>
                  <div style={{ fontSize: 12, fontWeight: 600, overflow: "hidden", textOverflow: "ellipsis", whiteSpace: "nowrap" }}>{u.author_name}</div>
                  <div style={{ fontSize: 10, color: "var(--t3)", fontFamily: "var(--mono)" }}>{u.author_id}</div>
                </div>
                <div style={{ fontSize: 13, fontWeight: 700, color: "var(--blue)" }}>{fmt(u.msg_count)}</div>
              </div>
            ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

import React,{useState} from "react";
import {useFetch} from "../hooks";
import {api,exportCSV,exportJSON} from "../api";
import {Spinner,Empty,DataTable} from "../components";
function DbExplorer({engine}:{engine:"ch"|"scylla"}){
  const isCh=engine==="ch";
  const [active,setActive]=useState<string|null>(null);
  const [tRows,setTRows]=useState<Record<string,unknown>[]>([]);
  const [tLoad,setTLoad]=useState(false);
  const [query,setQuery]=useState(isCh?"SELECT count() FROM senneo.messages":"SELECT * FROM senneo.messages_by_id LIMIT 10");
  const [qRows,setQRows]=useState<Record<string,unknown>[]>([]);
  const [qLoad,setQLoad]=useState(false);
  const [qErr,setQErr]=useState("");
  const [ms,setMs]=useState<number|null>(null);
  const {data:tables}=useFetch<{name:string;total_rows?:number}[]>(isCh?()=>api.db.ch.tables() as Promise<{name:string;total_rows?:number}[]>:()=>api.db.scylla.tables() as Promise<{name:string}[]>);
  async function selTable(name:string){setActive(name);setTLoad(true);try{if(isCh){setTRows(await api.db.ch.rows(name,50,0) as Record<string,unknown>[]);}else{const r=await api.db.scylla.query(`SELECT * FROM senneo.${name} LIMIT 50`) as {rows:Record<string,unknown>[]};setTRows(r.rows??[]);}}catch{setTRows([]);}finally{setTLoad(false);}}
  async function runQ(){if(!query.trim())return;setQLoad(true);setQErr("");setMs(null);const t=Date.now();try{let rows:Record<string,unknown>[]=[];if(isCh){const r=await api.db.ch.query(query) as {rows:Record<string,unknown>[];elapsedMs:number;error?:string};if(r.error){setQErr(r.error);return;}rows=r.rows;setMs(r.elapsedMs);}else{const r=await api.db.scylla.query(query) as {rows:Record<string,unknown>[];error?:string};if(r.error){setQErr(r.error);return;}rows=r.rows;setMs(Date.now()-t);}setQRows(rows);}catch(e){setQErr((e as Error).message);}finally{setQLoad(false);}}
  return(
    <div className="db-layout">
      <div className="db-tree">
        <div className="tree-engine">{isCh?"ClickHouse":"ScyllaDB"}</div>
        {!tables?<div className="empty" style={{height:60}}><Spinner/></div>:tables.map(t=>(
          <div key={t.name} className={`tree-table${active===t.name?" active":""}`} onClick={()=>selTable(t.name)}>
            <svg viewBox="0 0 12 12" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.2"><rect x="1" y="1" width="10" height="10" rx="1.5"/><path d="M1 4h10M4 1v10"/></svg>
            {t.name}
            {t.total_rows!=null&&<span className="tree-rows">{Number(t.total_rows).toLocaleString()}</span>}
          </div>))}
      </div>
      <div className="db-right">
        {active&&(
          <div className="results-card" style={{maxHeight:240}}>
            <div className="results-head" style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"space-between",padding:"10px 14px",borderBottom:"1px solid var(--border)",flexShrink:0}}>
              <span className="editor-label">{active}</span>
              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6}}>
                <span className="editor-meta">{tRows.length} satır</span>
                {tRows.length>0&&<button className="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" onClick={()=>exportCSV(tRows,active)}>CSV</button>}
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="results-body">{tLoad?<div className="empty"><Spinner/></div>:<DataTable rows={tRows}/>}</div>
          </div>)}
        <div className="editor-card">
          <div className="editor-head">
            <span className="editor-label">{isCh?"SQL":"CQL"}</span>
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center"}}>
              {ms!=null&&<span className="editor-meta">{ms}ms</span>}
              <button className="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onClick={runQ} disabled={qLoad}>{qLoad?<Spinner/>:"▶ Çalıştır"}</button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <textarea className="query-input" value={query} onChange={e=>setQuery(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={e=>{if((e.ctrlKey||e.metaKey)&&e.key==="Enter"){e.preventDefault();runQ();}}}/>
        </div>
        <div className="results-card">
          <div className="results-head" style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"space-between",padding:"10px 14px",borderBottom:"1px solid var(--border)",flexShrink:0}}>
            <span className="editor-label">Sonuçlar</span>
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6}}>
              {qRows.length>0&&<button className="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" onClick={()=>exportCSV(qRows,"result")}>CSV</button>}
              {qRows.length>0&&<button className="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" onClick={()=>exportJSON(qRows,"result")}>JSON</button>}
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="results-body">
            {qErr?<div className="err-box">{qErr}</div>:qLoad?<div className="empty"><Spinner/></div>:qRows.length===0?<div className="empty">Sorgu çalıştırın</div>:<DataTable rows={qRows}/>}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>);}
export const ClickHousePage=()=><div className="page-enter"><DbExplorer engine="ch"/></div>;
export const ScyllaPage=()=><div className="page-enter"><DbExplorer engine="scylla"/></div>;

import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef, useMemo } from "react";
import { api } from "../api";
import { avatarColor, avatarInitial, fmtTs, fmt } from "../hooks";
import type { Message } from "../types";

/* Group consecutive messages by same author */
function groupMessages(msgs: Message[]) {
  const groups: { author_id: string; author_name: string; channel_id: string; ts: string; messages: Message[] }[] = [];
  for (const m of msgs) {
    const last = groups[groups.length - 1];
    if (last && last.author_id === m.author_id && last.channel_id === m.channel_id) {
      last.messages.push(m);
    } else {
      groups.push({ author_id: m.author_id, author_name: m.author_name || m.author_id, channel_id: m.channel_id, ts: m.ts, messages: [m] });
    }
  }
  return groups;
}

function MsgAvatar({ authorId, authorName, size = 40 }: { authorId: string; authorName: string; size?: number }) {
  const [imgErr, setImgErr] = useState(false);
  const color = avatarColor(authorId);
  const initial = avatarInitial(authorName);

  // Try Discord CDN default avatar
  const defaultIdx = Math.abs(authorId.split('').reduce((a, c) => a + c.charCodeAt(0), 0)) % 6;
  const fallbackUrl = `https://cdn.discordapp.com/embed/avatars/${defaultIdx}.png`;

  return (
    <div
      className="msg-group-avatar"
      style={{ width: size, height: size, background: imgErr ? color : 'transparent', flexShrink: 0 }}
      data-tip={authorName}
    >
      {!imgErr ? (
        <img src={fallbackUrl} alt={authorName} onError={() => setImgErr(true)}
          style={{ width: size, height: size, borderRadius: '50%' }} />
      ) : initial}
    </div>
  );
}

export function LiveFeed() {
  const [msgs, setMsgs]     = useState<Message[]>([]);
  const [paused, setPaused] = useState(false);
  const [filter, setFilter] = useState("");
  const [total, setTotal]   = useState(0);
  const pausedRef = useRef(false);
  const bottomRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  pausedRef.current = paused;

  useEffect(() => {
    const id = setInterval(async () => {
      if (pausedRef.current) return;
      try {
        const res = await api.live.recent(40) as { messages: Message[] };
        const fresh = res.messages ?? [];
        if (!fresh.length) return;
        setMsgs(prev => {
          const ids = new Set(prev.map(m => m.message_id));
          const n   = fresh.filter(m => !ids.has(m.message_id));
          if (!n.length) return prev;
          setTotal(t => t + n.length);
          return [...n, ...prev].slice(0, 300);
        });
      } catch {}
    }, 1500);
    return () => clearInterval(id);
  }, []);

  const filtered = useMemo(() =>
    msgs.filter(m =>
      !filter ||
      m.content?.toLowerCase().includes(filter.toLowerCase()) ||
      m.author_name?.toLowerCase().includes(filter.toLowerCase())
    ), [msgs, filter]);

  const groups = useMemo(() => groupMessages(filtered), [filtered]);

  return (
    <div className="page-enter" style={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', height: 'calc(100vh - 80px)', overflow: 'hidden' }}>
      {/* Toolbar */}
      <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: 8, marginBottom: 12, flexShrink: 0, alignItems: 'center' }}>
        <div style={{ position: 'relative', flex: 1 }}>
          <input
            className="input"
            placeholder="Mesaj veya kullanıcı filtrele…"
            value={filter}
            onChange={e => setFilter(e.target.value)}
            style={{ paddingLeft: 36 }}
          />
          <span style={{ position: 'absolute', left: 12, top: '50%', transform: 'translateY(-50%)', fontSize: 14, color: 'var(--t4)' }}>🔍</span>
        </div>

        <button
          className={`btn ${paused ? 'btn-primary' : 'btn-secondary'}`}
          onClick={() => setPaused(p => !p)}
          data-tip={paused ? 'Devam et' : 'Duraklat'}
        >
          {paused ? '▶ Devam' : '⏸ Duraklat'}
        </button>

        <button className="btn btn-secondary" onClick={() => setMsgs([])} data-tip="Ekranı temizle">
          Temizle
        </button>

        {/* Live indicator */}
        <div style={{
          display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 8,
          padding: '6px 12px', borderRadius: 20,
          background: paused ? 'var(--orange-d)' : 'var(--green-d)',
          border: `1px solid ${paused ? 'rgba(230,126,34,.25)' : 'rgba(35,165,90,.25)'}`,
          fontSize: 12, fontWeight: 600,
          color: paused ? 'var(--orange)' : 'var(--green)',
        }}>
          <div style={{
            width: 7, height: 7, borderRadius: '50%', background: 'currentColor',
            animation: paused ? 'none' : 'breathe 2.5s ease-in-out infinite',
          }} />
          {fmt(total)} mesaj
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Feed */}
      <div style={{
        flex: 1, overflowY: 'auto',
        background: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.2)',
        border: '1px solid var(--border)',
        borderRadius: 'var(--r-xl)',
        paddingBottom: 8,
      }}>
        {!groups.length ? (
          <div className="empty" style={{ height: 200 }}>
            <div style={{ textAlign: 'center' }}>
              <div style={{ fontSize: 36, marginBottom: 10, opacity: 0.2 }}>💬</div>
              <div style={{ color: 'var(--t4)', fontSize: 13 }}>
                {filter ? `"${filter}" için mesaj bulunamadı` : 'Mesaj bekleniyor…'}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : (
          groups.map((group, gi) => (
            <div
              key={`${group.author_id}-${group.ts}-${gi}`}
              className="msg-group"
              style={{ paddingTop: gi === 0 ? 12 : 4, paddingBottom: 4, animation: gi === 0 ? 'slideUp .2s ease both' : undefined }}
            >
              {/* Avatar column */}
              <div className="msg-group-left">
                <MsgAvatar authorId={group.author_id} authorName={group.author_name} />
              </div>

              {/* Content column */}
              <div className="msg-group-content">
                {/* First message: show header */}
                <div className="msg-group-meta">
                  <span className="msg-author-name">{group.author_name}</span>
                  <span
                    className="msg-channel-badge"
                    data-tip={`Kanal: ${group.channel_id}`}
                  >
                    #{group.channel_id.slice(-6)}
                  </span>
                  <span className="msg-timestamp">{fmtTs(group.ts)}</span>
                </div>

                {/* Messages */}
                {group.messages.map((m, mi) => (
                  <div key={m.message_id}>
                    {m.content && (
                      <div
                        className={mi === 0 ? 'msg-text' : 'msg-text-continued'}
                        data-time={fmtTs(m.ts)}
                      >
                        {m.content}
                      </div>
                    )}

                    {/* Attachments */}
                    {m.media_urls?.filter((u: string) => /\.(png|jpg|gif|webp)$/i.test(u)).slice(0, 2).map((url: string, i: number) => (
                      <img
                        key={i} src={url} alt="" loading="lazy"
                        className="msg-attachment-img"
                        onError={e => (e.target as HTMLImageElement).style.display = 'none'}
                      />
                    ))}
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>
          ))
        )}
        <div ref={bottomRef} />
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

========================================================================
FILE: senneo-dashboard/src/pages/Overview.tsx

import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { Chart as ChartJS, CategoryScale, LinearScale, PointElement, LineElement, Filler, Tooltip } from 'chart.js';
import { Line } from 'react-chartjs-2';
import { useSSE, useInterval, useCountUp, fmt, fmtTs } from '../hooks';
import { api } from '../api';
import { Spinner, Empty, RateLimitLog } from '../components';
import type { HealthAll, DbSummary, RateLimitEntry } from '../types';

ChartJS.register(CategoryScale, LinearScale, PointElement, LineElement, Filler, Tooltip);

const MPS_HISTORY = 60;
const mpsLabels: string[] = Array(MPS_HISTORY).fill('');
const mpsData: number[]   = Array(MPS_HISTORY).fill(0);

/* Animated stat card */
function StatCard({ label, value, sub, color, icon }: {
  label: string; value: number; sub: string; color: string; icon?: string;
}) {
  const animated = useCountUp(value);
  return (
    <div
      className="stat-card"
      style={{ '--accent-color': color } as React.CSSProperties}
      data-tip={`${label}: ${fmt(value)}`}
    >
      {icon && (
        <div style={{ fontSize: 20, marginBottom: 8, opacity: 0.6 }}>{icon}</div>
      )}
      <div className="stat-label">{label}</div>
      <div className="stat-value" style={{ color }}>
        {animated.toLocaleString('tr-TR')}
      </div>
      <div className="stat-sub">{sub}</div>
    </div>
  );
}

/* Health card with latency bar */
function HealthCard({ name, h }: { name: string; h: { ok: boolean; latencyMs?: number; error?: string } }) {
  const latMs = h.latencyMs ?? 0;
  const barPct = Math.min((latMs / 50) * 100, 100); // 50ms = full bar

  return (
    <div className="health-card">
      <div className={`health-dot ${h.ok ? 'ok' : 'fail'}`} />
      <div style={{ flex: 1 }}>
        <div className="health-card-name">{name}</div>
        {h.ok && (
          <div style={{ height: 3, background: 'var(--glass)', borderRadius: 2, marginTop: 5, overflow: 'hidden' }}>
            <div style={{
              height: '100%',
              width: `${Math.max(barPct, 4)}%`,
              borderRadius: 2,
              background: latMs < 10 ? 'var(--green)' : latMs < 30 ? 'var(--yellow)' : 'var(--orange)',
              transition: 'width .5s ease',
            }} />
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
      <div className={`health-card-lat ${h.ok ? 'ok' : 'fail'}`}>
        {h.ok ? `${h.latencyMs}ms` : (h.error?.slice(0, 16) ?? 'ERR')}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

export function Overview() {
  const { summary: sseSummary } = useSSE();
  const [health, setHealth]   = useState<HealthAll | null>(null);
  const [dbSummary, setDbSummary] = useState<DbSummary | null>(null);
  const [rateLimitLog, setRateLimitLog] = useState<RateLimitEntry[]>([]);
  const [chartData, setChartData] = useState({ labels: [...mpsLabels], data: [...mpsData] });

  useInterval(() => {
    api.health.all().then(d => setHealth(d as HealthAll)).catch(() => {});
    api.live.summary().then(d => setDbSummary(d as DbSummary)).catch(() => {});
    (api as any).live.recent(0).catch?.(() => {});
    fetch('/live/ratelimits').then(r => r.json()).then(d => setRateLimitLog(d as RateLimitEntry[])).catch(() => {});
  }, 15_000);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!sseSummary) return;
    mpsLabels.shift(); mpsLabels.push(new Date().toLocaleTimeString('tr-TR'));
    mpsData.shift();   mpsData.push(sseSummary.msgsPerSec ?? 0);
    setChartData({ labels: [...mpsLabels], data: [...mpsData] });
  }, [sseSummary]);

  const pc = sseSummary?.phaseCounts ?? {};
  const active = Number(pc.active ?? 0);
  const totalChannels = sseSummary?.totalChannels ?? 0;
  const db = dbSummary?.database;

  const statCards = [
    { label: 'Toplam Scraped', value: Number(sseSummary?.totalScraped ?? 0), sub: 'scraper',      color: 'var(--blurple)', icon: '📡' },
    { label: 'Veritabanı',     value: Number(db?.db_total_messages ?? 0), sub: 'ClickHouse', color: 'var(--green)',   icon: '🗃️' },
    { label: 'Throughput',     value: Number(sseSummary?.msgsPerSec ?? 0),   sub: 'msg/s anlık',  color: 'var(--yellow)',  icon: '⚡' },
    { label: 'Aktif Kanal',    value: active,                           sub: `/ ${totalChannels} toplam`, color: 'var(--cyan)', icon: '📺' },
    { label: 'Hata',           value: Number(pc.error ?? 0),            sub: 'kanal',        color: 'var(--red)',     icon: '🚦' },
    { label: 'Kullanıcı',      value: Number(db?.db_total_authors ?? 0), sub: 'benzersiz',   color: 'var(--purple)',  icon: '👥' },
  ];

  return (
    <div className="page-enter">
      {/* ambient third blob */}
      <div className="ambient-mid" />

      {/* Stat cards with count-up */}
      <div className="stat-grid stat-grid-6" style={{ marginBottom: 16 }}>
        {statCards.map((s, i) => (
          <div key={s.label} style={{ animation: `slideUp .25s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1) ${i * 55}ms both` }}>
            <StatCard {...s} />
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Health */}
      <div className="health-card-grid" style={{ marginBottom: 16 }}>
        {health
          ? Object.entries(health).map(([name, h]) => (
              <div key={name} style={{ animation: 'slideUp .2s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1) both' }}>
                <HealthCard name={name} h={h} />
              </div>
            ))
          : [0,1,2,3].map(i => (
              <div key={i} className="health-card">
                <div className="health-dot unk" />
                <div style={{ flex: 1 }}>
                  <div className="skeleton skeleton-text" style={{ width: '60%' }} />
                </div>
                <div className="skeleton skeleton-text" style={{ width: 32 }} />
              </div>
            ))
        }
      </div>

      {/* Chart + Rate limit */}
      <div className="grid-2-1" style={{ marginBottom: 14 }}>
        <div className="panel">
          <div className="panel-head">
            <span className="panel-title">Throughput</span>
            <span className="chip chip-blue">{fmt(sseSummary?.msgsPerSec ?? 0)} msg/s</span>
          </div>
          <div className="chart-wrap">
            <Line
              data={{
                labels: chartData.labels,
                datasets: [{
                  label: 'msg/s',
                  data: chartData.data,
                  borderColor: '#5865F2',
                  backgroundColor: (ctx: any) => {
                    const g = ctx.chart.ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, 200);
                    g.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(88,101,242,0.18)');
                    g.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(88,101,242,0)');
                    return g;
                  },
                  fill: true, tension: 0.45, pointRadius: 0, borderWidth: 1.8,
                }],
              }}
              options={{
                responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false, animation: false,
                plugins: {
                  legend: { display: false },
                  tooltip: {
                    backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.85)',
                    borderColor: 'rgba(88,101,242,0.4)', borderWidth: 1,
                    titleFont: { family: 'var(--mono)', size: 10 },
                    bodyFont:  { family: 'var(--mono)', size: 12, weight: 700 },
                    callbacks: { label: (c: any) => ` ${c.raw} msg/s` },
                  },
                },
                scales: {
                  x: { display: false },
                  y: {
                    min: 0,
                    grid: { color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.04)' },
                    ticks: { color: 'rgba(235,235,245,0.3)', font: { family: 'var(--mono)', size: 10 } },
                  },
                },
              }}
            />
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="panel">
          <div className="panel-head">
            <span className="panel-title">Rate Limit Log</span>
            <span className="chip">{rateLimitLog.length}</span>
          </div>
          <div style={{ maxHeight: 222, overflowY: 'auto' }}>
            <RateLimitLog log={rateLimitLog} />
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* DB Summary */}
      {db && (
        <div className="panel mt">
          <div className="panel-head"><span className="panel-title">Veritabanı Özeti</span></div>
          <div style={{ display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(4,1fr)', padding: '16px 20px', gap: 12 }}>
            {([
              ['Mesaj',     db.db_total_messages,  'var(--blurple)'],
              ['Kullanıcı', db.db_total_authors,   'var(--purple)'],
              ['Kanal',     db.db_total_channels,  'var(--green)'],
              ['Guild',     db.db_total_guilds,    'var(--yellow)'],
            ] as const).map(([label, val, color]) => (
              <DbSummaryCell key={label as string} label={label as string} value={Number(val)} color={color as string} />
            ))}
          </div>
          <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: 16, padding: '10px 20px', borderTop: '1px solid var(--border)', fontSize: 11, color: 'var(--t3)' }}>
            <span>İlk: <span style={{ color: 'var(--t2)', fontFamily: 'var(--mono)' }}>{fmtTs(db.oldest_ts)}</span></span>
            <span>Son: <span style={{ color: 'var(--t2)', fontFamily: 'var(--mono)' }}>{fmtTs(db.newest_ts)}</span></span>
            <span style={{ marginLeft: 'auto' }}>Son ekleme: <span style={{ color: 'var(--green)', fontFamily: 'var(--mono)' }}>{fmtTs(db.last_insert_ts)}</span></span>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

function DbSummaryCell({ label, value, color }: { label: string; value: number; color: string }) {
  const animated = useCountUp(value);
  return (
    <div style={{ textAlign: 'center', padding: '8px 0' }}>
      <div style={{ fontSize: 26, fontWeight: 800, color, fontVariantNumeric: 'tabular-nums', letterSpacing: '-1px' }}>
        {animated.toLocaleString('tr-TR')}
      </div>
      <div style={{ fontSize: 10, color: 'var(--t3)', marginTop: 5, textTransform: 'uppercase', letterSpacing: '.6px' }}>
        {label}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

========================================================================
FILE: senneo-dashboard/src/pages/Scraper.tsx
SIZE: 14598

import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback, useMemo } from "react";
import { useSSE, useCountUp, useDebounce, fmt, fmtTs } from "../hooks";
import { api, exportCSV } from "../api";
import { Spinner, ProgressBar } from "../components";
import { AccountCombobox } from "../components/AccountCombobox";
import { deriveScrapePhase } from "../scrapePhase";
import type { ChannelStats, ChannelPage, ScrapePhase, ScraperSummary } from "../types";

const PAGE_SIZE = 50;

type Filter = "all" | ScrapePhase;

const FILTER_LABELS: Record<Filter, string> = {
  all: "Hepsi",
  active: "Aktif",
  queued: "Sirada",
  idle: "Beklemede",
  done: "Bitti",
  error: "Hata",
};

const PHASE_COLORS: Record<ScrapePhase, string> = {
  active: "var(--orange)",
  queued: "var(--yellow)",
  idle: "var(--cyan)",
  done: "var(--green)",
  error: "var(--red)",
};

const PHASE_ICONS: Record<ScrapePhase, string> = {
  active: "\u25CF",
  queued: "\u25D0",
  idle: "\u25CB",
  done: "\u2713",
  error: "\u2717",
};

/* -- Account name cache (idx -> username) -- */
const accountNameCache = new Map<number, string>();
function useAccountNames() {
  const [loaded, setLoaded] = useState(accountNameCache.size > 0);
  useEffect(() => {
    if (loaded) return;
    (api.accounts.list() as Promise<any>)
      .then((res: any) => {
        const accounts = res?.accounts ?? res ?? [];
        for (const acc of accounts) {
          const idx = acc.idx ?? acc.index;
          const name = acc.user?.username ?? acc.username ?? null;
          if (idx != null && name) accountNameCache.set(Number(idx), name);
        }
        setLoaded(true);
      })
      .catch(() => setLoaded(true));
  }, [loaded]);
  return { getAccountName: (idx?: number) => idx != null ? accountNameCache.get(idx) ?? null : null, loaded };
}

/* -- Phase tag -- */
function PhaseTag({ phase }: { phase: ScrapePhase }) {
  return (
    <span
      className="tag"
      style={{
        color: PHASE_COLORS[phase],
        borderColor: PHASE_COLORS[phase],
        background: `color-mix(in srgb, ${PHASE_COLORS[phase]} 12%, transparent)`,
        fontWeight: 600,
        fontSize: 11,
        padding: "2px 8px",
        borderRadius: 6,
        border: "1px solid",
        whiteSpace: "nowrap",
      }}
    >
      {PHASE_ICONS[phase]} {FILTER_LABELS[phase] ?? phase}
    </span>
  );
}

/* -- Channel row -- */
function CRow({ c, getAccountName }: { c: ChannelStats; getAccountName: (idx?: number) => string | null }) {
  const phase = c.scrapePhase ?? deriveScrapePhase(c);
  const accName = getAccountName(c.accountIdx);
  return (
    <tr style={{ transition: "background .08s" }}>
      {/* 1. Sunucu (Guild) — first column */}
      <td>
        <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 2 }}>
          <span style={{ fontSize: 13, fontWeight: 600, color: "var(--t1)" }}>{c.guildName || "\u2014"}</span>
          {c.guildId && (
            <span style={{ fontSize: 10, color: "var(--t5)", fontFamily: "var(--mono)" }}>{c.guildId}</span>
          )}
        </div>
      </td>
      {/* 2. Kanal (Channel) — second column */}
      <td>
        <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 2 }}>
          <span style={{ fontWeight: 600, fontSize: 13, color: "var(--t1)" }} data-tip={c.channelId}>
            {c.channelName ?? c.channelLabel ?? c.channelId}
          </span>
          <span style={{ fontSize: 10, color: "var(--t4)", fontFamily: "var(--mono)" }}>{c.channelId}</span>
        </div>
      </td>
      {/* 3. Hesap (Account) — name + index */}
      <td>
        {c.accountIdx != null ? (
          <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 1 }}>
            {accName && <span style={{ fontSize: 12, color: "var(--t2)", fontWeight: 500 }}>{accName}</span>}
            <span className="chip chip-blue" style={{ fontSize: 10 }}>#{c.accountIdx}</span>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <span style={{ color: "var(--t5)" }}>\u2014</span>
        )}
      </td>
      <td
        className="num"
        style={{
          fontWeight: c.totalScraped > 0 ? 600 : 400,
          color: c.totalScraped > 0 ? "var(--t1)" : "var(--t5)",
        }}
      >
        {c.totalScraped > 0 ? fmt(c.totalScraped) : "—"}
      </td>
      <td>
        {c.msgsPerSec > 0 ? (
          <span
            style={{
              color: "var(--orange)",
              fontWeight: 700,
              fontFamily: "var(--mono)",
              fontSize: 12,
            }}
          >
            {c.msgsPerSec}/s
          </span>
        ) : (
          <span style={{ color: "var(--t5)" }}>—</span>
        )}
      </td>
      <td style={{ minWidth: 90 }}>
        <ProgressBar value={c.progress ?? 0} complete={phase === "done"} />
      </td>
      <td>
        <PhaseTag phase={phase} />
      </td>
    </tr>
  );
}

/* -- Main Scraper page -- */
export function Scraper() {
  const { summary, connected } = useSSE();
  const { getAccountName } = useAccountNames();
  const [filter, setFilter] = useState<Filter>("all");
  const [accountFilter, setAccountFilter] = useState<number | null>(null);
  const [searchRaw, setSearchRaw] = useState("");
  const searchQ = useDebounce(searchRaw, 250);
  const [offset, setOffset] = useState(0);
  const [channels, setChannels] = useState<ChannelStats[]>([]);
  const [totalFiltered, setTotalFiltered] = useState(0);
  const [totalAll, setTotalAll] = useState(0);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);

  const accountOptions = useMemo(() => {
    const entries = [...accountNameCache.entries()].sort((a, b) => a[0] - b[0]);
    return entries;
  }, [channels]);

  // Fetch paginated channels from server
  const fetchChannels = useCallback(async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const res = (await api.live.channels({
        limit: PAGE_SIZE,
        offset,
        phase: filter !== "all" ? filter : undefined,
        q: searchQ || undefined,
        sort: "+guildName",
        ...(accountFilter != null ? { accountIdx: accountFilter } : {}),
      } as any)) as ChannelPage;
      setChannels(res.channels ?? []);
      setTotalFiltered(res.filtered ?? 0);
      setTotalAll(res.total ?? 0);
    } catch {
      /* keep stale */
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }, [offset, filter, searchQ, accountFilter]);

  // Fetch on mount and when filter/search/offset changes
  useEffect(() => {
    fetchChannels();
  }, [fetchChannels]);

  // Auto-refresh every 2s (lighter than SSE with all channels)
  useEffect(() => {
    const id = setInterval(fetchChannels, 2000);
    return () => clearInterval(id);
  }, [fetchChannels]);

  // Reset offset when filter or search changes
  useEffect(() => {
    setOffset(0);
  }, [filter, searchQ, accountFilter]);

  const pc = summary?.phaseCounts ?? { done: 0, active: 0, idle: 0, queued: 0, error: 0 };
  const totalScraped = useCountUp(Number(summary?.totalScraped ?? 0));

  const totalPages = Math.ceil(totalFiltered / PAGE_SIZE);
  const currentPage = Math.floor(offset / PAGE_SIZE) + 1;

  if (!summary) {
    return (
      <div className="page-enter">
        <div className="stat-grid stat-grid-4" style={{ marginBottom: 16 }}>
          {[0, 1, 2, 3].map((i) => (
            <div key={i} className="stat-card">
              <div className="skeleton skeleton-text" style={{ width: "45%", marginBottom: 10 }} />
              <div className="skeleton" style={{ height: 30, width: "55%", borderRadius: 6 }} />
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
        <div className="empty">
          <Spinner />
          <span style={{ color: "var(--t4)" }}>SSE baglanıyor...</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="page-enter">
      {/* Stat cards */}
      <div className="stat-grid stat-grid-4" style={{ marginBottom: 16 }}>
        {[
          { label: "Toplam mesaj", value: totalScraped, color: "var(--blurple)", icon: "\uD83D\uDCE1" },
          { label: "Bitti", value: pc.done ?? 0, color: "var(--green)", icon: "\u2713" },
          { label: "Aktif kanal", value: pc.active ?? 0, color: "var(--orange)", icon: "\u25CF" },
          { label: "Sirada / Beklemede", value: (pc.queued ?? 0) + (pc.idle ?? 0), color: "var(--yellow)", icon: "\u25D0" },
        ].map((s, i) => (
          <div
            key={s.label}
            className="stat-card"
            style={{ "--accent-color": s.color, animation: `slideUp .2s ease ${i * 45}ms both` } as React.CSSProperties}
          >
            <div style={{ fontSize: 18, marginBottom: 8, opacity: 0.65 }}>{s.icon}</div>
            <div className="stat-label">{s.label}</div>
            <div className="stat-value" style={{ color: s.color }}>
              {typeof s.value === "number" ? s.value.toLocaleString("tr-TR") : s.value}
            </div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Error banner */}
      {(pc.error ?? 0) > 0 && (
        <div className="panel" style={{ marginBottom: 12, borderColor: "rgba(255,69,58,.35)", fontSize: 13 }}>
          <strong style={{ color: "var(--red)" }}>{pc.error}</strong> kanalda hata bayragi var
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Search + info */}
      <div className="scraper-toolbar">
        <div className="scraper-search">
          <input
            type="search"
            placeholder="Guild / kanal adi veya ID ara..."
            value={searchRaw}
            onChange={(e) => setSearchRaw(e.target.value)}
            autoComplete="off"
            spellCheck={false}
          />
          <div className="scraper-hint">
            {totalAll.toLocaleString("tr-TR")} kanal &middot; {(summary?.totalGuilds ?? 0).toLocaleString("tr-TR")} sunucu &middot; guncelleme ~1s (SSE) + ~2s (tablo)
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Phase filters */}
      <div className="filter-row" style={{ marginBottom: 14 }}>
        {(Object.keys(FILTER_LABELS) as Filter[]).map((f) => (
          <button
            key={f}
            type="button"
            className={`btn btn-sm ${filter === f ? "btn-primary" : "btn-secondary"}`}
            onClick={() => setFilter(f)}
          >
            {FILTER_LABELS[f]}
            {f !== "all" && (
              <span style={{ opacity: 0.75, marginLeft: 4 }}>({pc[f] ?? 0})</span>
            )}
          </button>
        ))}
        <span className="chip" style={{ marginLeft: "auto" }}>
          {totalFiltered} / {totalAll} kanal
        </span>
        {/* Account filter (custom combobox — dark mode safe, searchable for 1000+ accounts) */}
        {accountOptions.length > 0 && (
          <AccountCombobox
            options={accountOptions}
            value={accountFilter}
            onChange={setAccountFilter}
          />
        )}
        <button
          className="btn btn-secondary btn-sm"
          onClick={() => exportCSV(channels as unknown as Record<string, unknown>[], "channels")}
          type="button"
          data-tip="CSV indir"
        >
          Export
        </button>
      </div>

      {/* Channel table */}
      <div className="panel" style={{ overflow: "hidden" }}>
        <div className="tbl-wrap" style={{ maxHeight: "calc(100vh - 400px)", overflowY: "auto" }}>
          <table style={{ width: "100%", position: "relative" }}>
            <thead>
              <tr>
                <th style={{ minWidth: 140 }}>Sunucu</th>
                <th style={{ minWidth: 180 }}>Kanal</th>
                <th>Hesap</th>
                <th className="num">Mesaj</th>
                <th className="num">Hiz</th>
                <th style={{ minWidth: 90 }}>Ilerleme</th>
                <th>Durum</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              {loading && channels.length === 0 ? (
                <tr>
                  <td colSpan={7}>
                    <div className="empty" style={{ height: 120 }}>
                      <Spinner />
                    </div>
                  </td>
                </tr>
              ) : channels.length === 0 ? (
                <tr>
                  <td colSpan={7}>
                    <div className="empty" style={{ height: 120 }}>
                      <div style={{ textAlign: "center" }}>
                        <div style={{ fontSize: 32, opacity: 0.2, marginBottom: 8 }}>{"\uD83D\uDCE1"}</div>
                        <div>Arama veya filtre sonucu yok</div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </td>
                </tr>
              ) : (
                channels.map((c) => <CRow key={c.channelId} c={c} getAccountName={getAccountName} />)
              )}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>

        {/* Pagination */}
        {totalPages > 1 && (
          <div
            style={{
              display: "flex",
              alignItems: "center",
              justifyContent: "center",
              gap: 8,
              padding: "12px 16px",
              borderTop: "1px solid var(--border)",
              fontSize: 12,
            }}
          >
            <button
              className="btn btn-sm btn-secondary"
              disabled={offset === 0}
              onClick={() => setOffset(Math.max(0, offset - PAGE_SIZE))}
            >
              &laquo; Onceki
            </button>
            <span style={{ color: "var(--t3)", fontFamily: "var(--mono)" }}>
              {currentPage} / {totalPages}
            </span>
            <button
              className="btn btn-sm btn-secondary"
              disabled={offset + PAGE_SIZE >= totalFiltered}
              onClick={() => setOffset(offset + PAGE_SIZE)}
            >
              Sonraki &raquo;
            </button>
            <span style={{ color: "var(--t4)", marginLeft: 8 }}>
              ({totalFiltered.toLocaleString("tr-TR")} sonuc)
            </span>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Footer hint — phase definitions matching computeScrapePhase priority */}
      <div className="scraper-hint" style={{ marginTop: 12 }}>
        Son guncelleme: {summary.updatedAt ? fmtTs(summary.updatedAt) : "\u2014"} &middot;{" "}
        <strong>Bitti</strong> = checkpoint complete &middot;{" "}
        <strong>Aktif</strong> = msg/s &gt; 0 &middot;{" "}
        <strong>Hata</strong> = hata var (aktif degil) &middot;{" "}
        <strong>Sirada</strong> = henuz baslamadi &middot;{" "}
        <strong>Beklemede</strong> = veri var, su an cekim yok
        {loading && <span style={{ marginLeft: 8, color: "var(--orange)" }}>(yenileniyor...)</span>}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

import React, { useState, useMemo, useCallback } from "react";
import { api, exportCSV } from "../api";
import { avatarColor, fmtTs } from "../hooks";
import { Spinner } from "../components";
import type { Message } from "../types";

/* Highlight matching keyword in text */
function Highlight({ text, keyword }: { text: string; keyword: string }) {
  if (!keyword || !text) return <>{text}</>;
  const parts = text.split(new RegExp(`(${keyword.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&')})`, 'gi'));
  return (
    <>
      {parts.map((part, i) =>
        part.toLowerCase() === keyword.toLowerCase()
          ? <mark key={i} className="highlight">{part}</mark>
          : <span key={i}>{part}</span>
      )}
    </>
  );
}

function ResultAvatar({ authorId, authorName }: { authorId: string; authorName?: string }) {
  const [err, setErr] = useState(false);
  const color = avatarColor(authorId);
  const initial = (authorName?.[0] || '?').toUpperCase();
  const idx = Math.abs(authorId.split('').reduce((a, c) => a + c.charCodeAt(0), 0)) % 6;

  return (
    <div className="search-result-avatar" style={{ background: err ? color : 'transparent' }}>
      {!err
        ? <img src={`https://cdn.discordapp.com/embed/avatars/${idx}.png`} alt="" onError={() => setErr(true)} style={{ width: 26, height: 26, borderRadius: '50%' }} />
        : initial
      }
    </div>
  );
}

export function Search() {
  const [q, setQ]           = useState("");
  const [limit, setLimit]   = useState(50);
  const [results, setResults] = useState<Message[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [searched, setSearched] = useState(false);
  const [sortBy, setSortBy] = useState<'newest'|'oldest'>('newest');

  const doSearch = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!q.trim()) return;
    setLoading(true); setSearched(true);
    try {
      const r = await api.db.ch.search(q.trim(), limit) as { rows: Message[] };
      setResults(r.rows ?? []);
    } catch { setResults([]); }
    finally { setLoading(false); }
  }, [q, limit]);

  const sorted = useMemo(() => {
    const arr = [...results];
    if (sortBy === 'newest') arr.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.ts).getTime() - new Date(a.ts).getTime());
    else arr.sort((a, b) => new Date(a.ts).getTime() - new Date(b.ts).getTime());
    return arr;
  }, [results, sortBy]);

  const uniqueChannels = useMemo(() => [...new Set(results.map(r => r.channel_id))], [results]);
  const uniqueAuthors  = useMemo(() => [...new Set(results.map(r => r.author_id))], [results]);

  return (
    <div className="page-enter">
      {/* Search bar */}
      <div style={{
        position: 'relative', marginBottom: 16,
        animation: 'slideUp .22s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1) both',
      }}>
        <div style={{
          display: 'flex', gap: 8, alignItems: 'center',
          background: 'var(--glass)',
          border: '1px solid var(--gb)',
          borderRadius: 'var(--r-xl)',
          padding: '4px 4px 4px 16px',
          backdropFilter: 'blur(16px)',
          transition: 'border-color .2s, box-shadow .2s',
          boxShadow: q ? '0 0 32px var(--blurple-gs)' : 'none',
          ...(q ? { borderColor: 'rgba(88,101,242,0.4)' } : {}),
        }}>
          <span style={{ fontSize: 18, opacity: 0.4 }}>🔍</span>
          <input
            className="input"
            placeholder="Mesaj içeriğinde ara…"
            value={q}
            onChange={e => setQ(e.target.value)}
            onKeyDown={e => e.key === 'Enter' && doSearch()}
            style={{
              background: 'transparent', border: 'none',
              boxShadow: 'none', flex: 1,
              fontSize: 16, fontWeight: 500, letterSpacing: '-.2px',
            }}
            autoFocus
          />
          <select
            className="input"
            value={limit}
            onChange={e => setLimit(Number(e.target.value))}
            style={{ width: 110, background: 'var(--bg-input)', flexShrink: 0 }}
          >
            {[20, 50, 100, 200].map(l => <option key={l} value={l}>{l} sonuç</option>)}
          </select>
          <button
            className="btn btn-primary"
            onClick={doSearch}
            disabled={loading || !q.trim()}
            style={{ borderRadius: 'var(--r-lg)', padding: '9px 20px' }}
          >
            {loading ? <Spinner /> : 'Ara'}
          </button>
        </div>

        {q && (
          <div style={{ position: 'absolute', right: 16, top: 'calc(100% + 6px)', fontSize: 11, color: 'var(--t4)' }}>
            Enter ile ara
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Empty state */}
      {!searched && (
        <div className="panel">
          <div className="search-empty-state">
            <div className="search-empty-icon">🔎</div>
            <div className="search-empty-title">Mesajlarda arama yap</div>
            <div className="search-empty-sub">
              Kelime veya ifade girerek 5M+ mesaj içinde anında arama yapın
            </div>
            <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: 8, marginTop: 16, flexWrap: 'wrap', justifyContent: 'center' }}>
              {['lounge', 'genel', 'bot', 'merhaba', 'satılık'].map(s => (
                <button
                  key={s}
                  className="filter-chip"
                  onClick={() => { setQ(s); setTimeout(doSearch, 50); }}
                >
                  {s}
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Loading */}
      {loading && (
        <div className="panel">
          <div className="empty" style={{ height: 200 }}>
            <div style={{ textAlign: 'center' }}>
              <Spinner />
              <div style={{ marginTop: 12, color: 'var(--t4)', fontSize: 13 }}>Aranıyor…</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* No results */}
      {searched && !loading && results.length === 0 && (
        <div className="panel">
          <div className="search-empty-state">
            <div className="search-empty-icon">😶</div>
            <div className="search-empty-title">Sonuç bulunamadı</div>
            <div className="search-empty-sub">"{q}" için eşleşen mesaj yok</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Results */}
      {searched && !loading && results.length > 0 && (
        <div className="panel" style={{ animation: 'slideUp .2s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1) both' }}>
          {/* Filters bar */}
          <div className="search-filters">
            <span style={{ fontSize: 12, color: 'var(--t3)', fontWeight: 600 }}>
              {results.length} sonuç
            </span>
            <div style={{ marginLeft: 'auto', display: 'flex', gap: 6, alignItems: 'center' }}>
              <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: 'var(--t4)' }}>Sıralama:</span>
              {(['newest', 'oldest'] as const).map(s => (
                <button
                  key={s}
                  className={`filter-chip ${sortBy === s ? 'active' : ''}`}
                  onClick={() => setSortBy(s)}
                >
                  {s === 'newest' ? '↓ Yeni' : '↑ Eski'}
                </button>
              ))}
              <button
                className="btn btn-secondary btn-sm"
                onClick={() => exportCSV(results as unknown as Record<string, unknown>[], `search-${q}`)}
              >
                CSV
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Stats chips */}
          <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: 8, padding: '8px 16px', borderBottom: '1px solid var(--border)', flexWrap: 'wrap' }}>
            <span className="chip">{uniqueChannels.length} kanal</span>
            <span className="chip">{uniqueAuthors.length} kullanıcı</span>
            <span className="chip chip-blue">"{q}"</span>
          </div>

          {/* Result cards */}
          {sorted.map((m, i) => (
            <div
              key={m.message_id}
              className="search-result-card"
              style={{ animationDelay: `${Math.min(i * 20, 300)}ms`, animation: 'slideUp .2s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1) both' }}
            >
              <div className="search-result-header">
                <ResultAvatar authorId={m.author_id} authorName={m.author_name} />
                <span className="search-result-author">{m.author_name}</span>
                <span className="search-result-channel" data-tip={m.channel_id}>
                  #{m.channel_id.slice(-6)}
                </span>
                <span className="search-result-time">{fmtTs(m.ts)}</span>
              </div>
              <div className="search-result-body">
                <Highlight text={m.content || ''} keyword={q} />
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

import React, { useState, useEffect, useMemo, useCallback } from "react";
import { api, exportCSV } from "../api";
import { useFetch, useDebounce, useCountUp, fmt, fmtTs, avatarColor } from "../hooks";
import { Spinner, Empty } from "../components";
import type { Message, TopUser } from "../types";

const SNOWFLAKE_RE = /^\d{17,20}$/;

/* ── Avatar ── */
function Avatar({ userId, name, size = 40 }: { userId: string; name?: string; size?: number }) {
  const [err, setErr] = useState(false);
  const color   = avatarColor(userId);
  const initial = (name?.[0] || "?").toUpperCase();
  const idx     = Math.abs([...userId].reduce((a, c) => a + c.charCodeAt(0), 0)) % 6;
  return (
    <div style={{
      width: size, height: size, borderRadius: "50%",
      background: err ? color : "transparent",
      display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center",
      fontSize: size * 0.38, fontWeight: 700, color: "#fff",
      overflow: "hidden", flexShrink: 0,
    }}>
      {!err
        ? <img src={`https://cdn.discordapp.com/embed/avatars/${idx}.png`}
            style={{ width: "100%", height: "100%", objectFit: "cover" }}
            onError={() => setErr(true)} alt="" />
        : initial}
    </div>
  );
}

/* ── Rank medal colors ── */
function rankColor(i: number) {
  if (i === 0) return "#FFD60A";
  if (i === 1) return "#C0C0C0";
  if (i === 2) return "#CD7F32";
  return "var(--t4)";
}

/* ── User list item ── */
function UserRow({ user, rank, onClick }: { user: TopUser; rank: number; onClick: () => void }) {
  const color = avatarColor(user.author_id);
  return (
    <div
      onClick={onClick}
      style={{
        display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 14,
        padding: "12px 20px", cursor: "pointer",
        borderBottom: "1px solid var(--b0)",
        transition: "background .1s",
        animation: `slideUp .2s ease ${Math.min(rank * 18, 400)}ms both`,
      }}
      onMouseEnter={e => (e.currentTarget.style.background = "var(--g1)")}
      onMouseLeave={e => (e.currentTarget.style.background = "")}
    >
      {/* Rank */}
      <div style={{ width: 24, textAlign: "right", flexShrink: 0 }}>
        <span style={{ fontSize: 13, fontWeight: 700, color: rankColor(rank) }}>
          {rank + 1}
        </span>
      </div>

      {/* Avatar */}
      <Avatar userId={user.author_id} name={user.author_name} size={38} />

      {/* Name + ID */}
      <div style={{ flex: 1, minWidth: 0 }}>
        <div style={{ fontSize: 14, fontWeight: 600, color: "var(--t1)", overflow: "hidden", textOverflow: "ellipsis", whiteSpace: "nowrap" }}>
          {user.author_name || "Bilinmeyen"}
        </div>
        <div style={{ fontSize: 10, color: "var(--t4)", fontFamily: "var(--mono)", marginTop: 1 }}>
          {user.author_id}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Msg count */}
      <div style={{ fontSize: 16, fontWeight: 800, color: "var(--blue)", fontVariantNumeric: "tabular-nums", letterSpacing: "-0.5px" }}>
        {fmt(user.msg_count)}
      </div>

      <span style={{ fontSize: 12, color: "var(--t4)" }}>→</span>
    </div>
  );
}

/* ── User detail ── */
function UserDetail({ user, onBack }: { user: TopUser; onBack: () => void }) {
  const [limit, setLimit] = useState(50);
  const color = avatarColor(user.author_id);

  // Fetch messages via SQL — author_id filter
  const { data: result, loading, error, reload } = useFetch<{ rows: Message[]; elapsedMs?: number }>(
    () => api.db.ch.query(
      `SELECT message_id, channel_id, guild_id, author_id, author_name, content, ts
       FROM senneo.messages
       WHERE author_id = '${user.author_id}'
       ORDER BY ts DESC
       LIMIT ${limit}`
    ) as Promise<{ rows: Message[]; elapsedMs?: number }>,
    [user.author_id, limit]
  );

  const msgs = result?.rows || [];
  const channels = [...new Set(msgs.map(m => m.channel_id))];
  const animCount = useCountUp(user.msg_count);

  return (
    <div style={{ animation: "pageIn .22s ease both" }}>
      {/* Back */}
      <button className="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" onClick={onBack} style={{ marginBottom: 16, gap: 6 }}>
        ← Geri
      </button>

      {/* Profile header */}
      <div style={{
        background: "var(--g0)", border: "1px solid var(--gb0)",
        borderRadius: "var(--r-xl)", padding: "28px 28px 24px",
        marginBottom: 16, position: "relative", overflow: "hidden",
        backdropFilter: "blur(20px)",
      }}>
        {/* Gradient bg */}
        <div style={{
          position: "absolute", inset: 0,
          background: `radial-gradient(ellipse at 0% 50%, ${color}18 0%, transparent 60%)`,
          pointerEvents: "none",
        }} />

        {/* Top row */}
        <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 20, position: "relative", zIndex: 1, marginBottom: 24 }}>
          <div style={{
            width: 80, height: 80, borderRadius: "50%",
            border: `3px solid ${color}55`, overflow: "hidden", flexShrink: 0,
          }}>
            <Avatar userId={user.author_id} name={user.author_name} size={80} />
          </div>
          <div>
            <div style={{ fontSize: 28, fontWeight: 800, color: "var(--t1)", letterSpacing: "-0.6px", lineHeight: 1 }}>
              {user.author_name || "Bilinmeyen Kullanıcı"}
            </div>
            <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: "var(--t4)", fontFamily: "var(--mono)", marginTop: 6 }}>
              ID: {user.author_id}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Stats row */}
        <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 12, position: "relative", zIndex: 1 }}>
          {[
            { label: "Toplam Mesaj", value: animCount.toLocaleString("tr-TR"), color: "var(--blue)" },
            { label: "Kanallar",     value: loading ? "…" : String(channels.length || "—"), color: "var(--green)" },
            { label: "Son Mesaj",    value: msgs[0] ? fmtTs(msgs[0].ts) : "—", color: "var(--orange)" },
          ].map(s => (
            <div key={s.label} style={{
              flex: 1, padding: "14px 16px",
              background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.3)", border: "1px solid var(--b0)",
              borderRadius: "var(--r-md)", textAlign: "center",
            }}>
              <div style={{ fontSize: 22, fontWeight: 800, color: s.color, fontVariantNumeric: "tabular-nums", letterSpacing: "-0.8px", marginBottom: 4 }}>
                {s.value}
              </div>
              <div style={{ fontSize: 10, fontWeight: 700, textTransform: "uppercase", letterSpacing: ".7px", color: "var(--t4)" }}>
                {s.label}
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Messages panel */}
      <div className="panel">
        <div className="panel-head">
          <span className="panel-title">Mesajlar ({loading ? "…" : msgs.length})</span>
          <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 6, alignItems: "center" }}>
            {result?.elapsedMs && (
              <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "var(--t4)", fontFamily: "var(--mono)" }}>{result.elapsedMs}ms</span>
            )}
            <select className="input input-sm" value={limit} onChange={e => setLimit(Number(e.target.value))} style={{ width: 90 }}>
              {[50, 100, 200, 500].map(l => <option key={l} value={l}>{l}</option>)}
            </select>
            {msgs.length > 0 && (
              <button className="btn btn-secondary btn-sm"
                onClick={() => exportCSV(msgs as unknown as Record<string, unknown>[], `user-${user.author_id}`)}>
                CSV
              </button>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>

        {loading ? (
          <div className="empty" style={{ height: 140 }}><Spinner /></div>
        ) : error ? (
          <div style={{ padding: 16, color: "var(--red)", fontFamily: "var(--mono)", fontSize: 12 }}>
            Hata: {error}
          </div>
        ) : msgs.length === 0 ? (
          <Empty text="Bu kullanıcıya ait mesaj bulunamadı" />
        ) : (
          msgs.map((m, i) => (
            <div key={m.message_id}
              style={{
                padding: "10px 16px", borderBottom: "1px solid var(--b0)",
                transition: "background .08s",
                animation: `slideUp .16s ease ${Math.min(i * 12, 300)}ms both`,
              }}
              onMouseEnter={e => (e.currentTarget.style.background = "var(--g0)")}
              onMouseLeave={e => (e.currentTarget.style.background = "")}
            >
              <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 8, marginBottom: 4 }}>
                <span style={{ fontSize: 10, color: "var(--blue)", fontFamily: "var(--mono)", padding: "1px 6px", background: "var(--blue-d)", borderRadius: 4 }}>
                  #{m.channel_id.slice(-6)}
                </span>
                {m.guild_id && (
                  <span style={{ fontSize: 10, color: "var(--t4)", fontFamily: "var(--mono)" }}>
                    guild/{m.guild_id.slice(-6)}
                  </span>
                )}
                <span style={{ fontSize: 10, color: "var(--t4)", fontFamily: "var(--mono)", marginLeft: "auto" }}>
                  {fmtTs(m.ts)}
                </span>
              </div>
              <div style={{ fontSize: 13, color: "var(--t2)", lineHeight: 1.55, wordBreak: "break-word" }}>
                {m.content || <span style={{ color: "var(--t5)", fontStyle: "italic" }}>İçerik yok</span>}
              </div>
            </div>
          ))
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

/* ═══ MAIN ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
export function UserProfiles() {
  const [q, setQ]               = useState("");
  const [selected, setSelected] = useState<TopUser | null>(null);
  const [searchResults, setSearchResults] = useState<TopUser[] | null>(null);
  const [searching, setSearching] = useState(false);
  const [searchError, setSearchError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const debouncedQ = useDebounce(q, 400);

  const { data: topUsers, loading } = useFetch<TopUser[]>(
    () => api.db.ch.topUsers(100) as Promise<TopUser[]>
  );

  // Global search: when debouncedQ is a snowflake, do PK lookup; otherwise name search
  useEffect(() => {
    const trimmed = debouncedQ.trim();
    if (!trimmed) { setSearchResults(null); setSearchError(null); return; }

    let cancelled = false;
    setSearching(true);
    setSearchError(null);

    (async () => {
      try {
        if (SNOWFLAKE_RE.test(trimmed)) {
          const res = await api.db.ch.userById(trimmed) as any;
          if (cancelled) return;
          if (res?.user) {
            setSearchResults([{
              author_id: String(res.user.author_id),
              author_name: res.user.author_name ?? "",
              msg_count: Number(res.user.msg_count ?? 0),
            }]);
          } else {
            setSearchResults([]);
          }
        } else {
          const res = await api.db.ch.userByName(trimmed, 50) as any;
          if (cancelled) return;
          const users = (res?.users ?? []).map((u: any) => ({
            author_id: String(u.author_id),
            author_name: u.author_name ?? "",
            msg_count: 0,
          }));
          setSearchResults(users);
        }
      } catch (err) {
        if (!cancelled) setSearchError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Hata");
      } finally {
        if (!cancelled) setSearching(false);
      }
    })();

    return () => { cancelled = true; };
  }, [debouncedQ]);

  // Show search results if query exists, otherwise top 100
  const displayList = searchResults !== null ? searchResults : (topUsers ?? []);
  const isSearchMode = debouncedQ.trim().length > 0;
  const listLoading = isSearchMode ? searching : loading;

  if (selected) {
    return (
      <div className="page-enter">
        <UserDetail user={selected} onBack={() => setSelected(null)} />
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="page-enter">
      {/* Header */}
      <div style={{ marginBottom: 20 }}>
        <div style={{ fontSize: 24, fontWeight: 800, color: "var(--t1)", letterSpacing: "-.5px", marginBottom: 4 }}>
          Kullanici Profilleri
        </div>
        <div style={{ fontSize: 13, color: "var(--t3)" }}>
          {isSearchMode
            ? "Tum veritabaninda arama yapiliyor (ID veya isim)"
            : "En aktif 100 kullanici — ID veya isim ile tum DB'de arayabilirsiniz"}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Search */}
      <div style={{ position: "relative", marginBottom: 14 }}>
        <span style={{ position: "absolute", left: 13, top: "50%", transform: "translateY(-50%)", fontSize: 14, color: "var(--t4)", pointerEvents: "none" }}>🔍</span>
        <input
          className="input"
          placeholder="Kullanici ID (snowflake) veya isim ile ara..."
          value={q}
          onChange={e => setQ(e.target.value)}
          style={{ paddingLeft: 38, fontSize: 15 }}
          autoFocus
        />
        {searching && (
          <span style={{ position: "absolute", right: 13, top: "50%", transform: "translateY(-50%)" }}>
            <Spinner />
          </span>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* List */}
      <div className="panel" style={{ overflow: "hidden" }}>
        {/* Header row */}
        <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "space-between", padding: "8px 20px", borderBottom: "1px solid var(--b0)" }}>
          <span style={{ fontSize: 10, fontWeight: 700, textTransform: "uppercase", letterSpacing: .8, color: "var(--t4)" }}>
            {listLoading ? "Araniyor..." : isSearchMode ? `${displayList.length} sonuc (tum DB)` : `Top ${displayList.length} kullanici`}
          </span>
          <span style={{ fontSize: 10, fontWeight: 700, textTransform: "uppercase", letterSpacing: .8, color: "var(--t4)" }}>Mesaj</span>
        </div>

        {searchError ? (
          <div style={{ padding: 16, color: "var(--red)", fontFamily: "var(--mono)", fontSize: 12 }}>
            Hata: {searchError}
          </div>
        ) : listLoading ? (
          <div style={{ padding: 20, display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 12 }}>
            {[...Array(6)].map((_, i) => (
              <div key={i} style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 14, padding: "0 4px" }}>
                <div className="skeleton" style={{ width: 24, height: 14, borderRadius: 4 }} />
                <div className="skeleton skeleton-avatar" style={{ width: 38, height: 38 }} />
                <div style={{ flex: 1 }}>
                  <div className="skeleton skeleton-line" style={{ width: "35%", marginBottom: 6 }} />
                  <div className="skeleton skeleton-text" style={{ width: "20%" }} />
                </div>
                <div className="skeleton" style={{ width: 60, height: 18, borderRadius: 4 }} />
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        ) : displayList.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="empty" style={{ height: 120 }}>
            {isSearchMode
              ? SNOWFLAKE_RE.test(debouncedQ.trim())
                ? `ID "${debouncedQ.trim()}" veritabaninda bulunamadi`
                : `"${debouncedQ.trim()}" ile eslesen kullanici yok`
              : "Kullanici yok"}
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div style={{ maxHeight: "calc(100vh - 280px)", overflowY: "auto" }}>
            {displayList.map((u, i) => (
              <UserRow key={u.author_id} user={u} rank={i} onClick={() => setSelected(u)} />
            ))}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

========================================================================
FILE: senneo-dashboard/src/scrapePhase.ts
SIZE: 646
========================================================================
import type { ChannelStats, ScrapePhase } from "./types";

/**
 * Client-side fallback — mirrors server-side computeScrapePhase priority:
 *  1. complete → done   (single source of truth)
 *  2. msgsPerSec>0 → active  (active trumps stale errors)
 *  3. errors → error
 *  4. no data → queued
 *  5. else → idle
 */
export function deriveScrapePhase(c: ChannelStats): ScrapePhase {
  if (c.scrapePhase) return c.scrapePhase;
  if (c.complete) return "done";
  if (c.msgsPerSec > 0) return "active";
  if (c.errors?.length > 0) return "error";
  if (c.totalScraped === 0 && (c.progress ?? 0) === 0) return "queued";
  return "idle";
}

SIZE: 37517

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   SENNEO · APPLE HIG × DISCORD ULTRA PREMIUM
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

:root {
  /* ── Apple System Colors ── */
  --blue:     #0A84FF;
  --green:    #30D158;
  --red:      #FF453A;
  --orange:   #FF9F0A;
  --yellow:   #FFD60A;
  --purple:   #BF5AF2;
  --pink:     #FF375F;

// Add these to your existing types.ts
// If types.ts doesn't exist, create it with this content

export type Page =
  | 'overview' | 'scraper' | 'accounts' | 'livefeed'
  | 'analytics' | 'users' | 'search' | 'clickhouse' | 'scylla';

export interface Toast {
  id: string;
  type: 'success' | 'error' | 'info';
  title: string;
  msg?: string;
  actionLabel?: string;
  onAction?: () => void;
}

// Add to existing types if they exist:
export interface RateLimitEntry { ts: string; channelId: string; waitMs: number; }

export interface Message {
  message_id: string;
  channel_id: string;
  guild_id?: string;
  author_id: string;
  author_name?: string;
  content?: string;
  ts: string;
  media_urls?: string[];
  attachments?: string[];
}

/** Sunucu tarafı /live ile uyumlu; filtreler buna göre */
export type ScrapePhase = 'done' | 'error' | 'active' | 'idle' | 'queued';

export interface ChannelStats {
  channelId: string;
  guildId?: string;
  /** name_cache veya hedef etiketi */
  channelName?: string;
  guildName?: string;
  channelLabel?: string;
  accountIdx?: number;
  totalScraped: number;
  msgsPerSec: number;
  rateLimitHits: number;
  lastUpdated?: string;
  progress?: number;
  complete: boolean;
  errors: string[];
  scrapePhase?: ScrapePhase;
}

/** Lightweight summary from SSE /live/stream — no per-channel data */
export interface ScraperSummary {
  totalScraped: number;
  msgsPerSec: number;
  totalChannels: number;
  totalGuilds: number;
  phaseCounts: Record<ScrapePhase | string, number>;
  updatedAt?: string;
  startedAt?: string;
}

/** Paginated channel response from GET /live/channels */
export interface ChannelPage {
  channels: ChannelStats[];
  total: number;
  filtered: number;
}

/** Guild summary from GET /live/guilds */
export interface GuildSummary {
  guildId: string;
  guildName: string;
  channelCount: number;
  activeCount: number;
  totalScraped: number;
}

/** Legacy full SSE (backwards compat — avoid at scale) */
export interface ScraperStats {
  totalScraped: number;
  msgsPerSec: number;
  channels: Record<string, ChannelStats>;
  rateLimitLog: RateLimitEntry[];
  updatedAt?: string;
  startedAt?: string;
}

export interface HealthEntry { ok: boolean; latencyMs?: number; error?: string; }
export type HealthAll = Record<string, HealthEntry>;

export interface DbSummary {
  database: {
    db_total_messages: number;
    db_total_authors: number;
    db_total_channels: number;
    db_total_guilds: number;
    oldest_ts?: string;
    newest_ts?: string;
    last_insert_ts?: string;
  };
}

export interface AccountTarget {
  channelId: string;
  guildId: string;
  channelName?: string;
}

export interface Account {
  idx: number;
  color?: string;
  user?: { username: string; id?: string; avatar?: string; discriminator?: string };
  token?: string;
  targets: AccountTarget[];
}

export interface AccountsResponse {
  accounts: Account[];
  targets: AccountTarget[];
}

export interface DailyActivity  { date: string; messages: number; users: number; }
export interface HourlyActivity { hour: number; messages: number; }
export interface TopChannel     { channel_id: string; msg_count: number; unique_users: number; }
export interface TopUser        { author_id: string; author_name: string; msg_count: number; }

import { defineConfig } from 'vite'
import react from '@vitejs/plugin-react'

export default defineConfig({
  plugins: [react()],
  build: {
    outDir: '../senneo/packages/api/public',
    emptyOutDir: true,
  },
  server: {
    proxy: {
      '/live':     'http://localhost:4000',
      '/health':   'http://localhost:4000',
      '/messages': 'http://localhost:4000',
      '/accounts': 'http://localhost:4000',
      '/db':       'http://localhost:4000',
    },
  },
})
