"use strict";
Object.defineProperty(exports, "__esModule", { value: true });
exports.dbRouter = dbRouter;
const express_1 = require("express");
const cassandra_driver_1 = require("cassandra-driver");
const CH_DB = process.env.CLICKHOUSE_DB ?? 'senneo';
const KEYSPACE = process.env.SCYLLA_KEYSPACE ?? 'senneo';
const DESTRUCTIVE = /^\s*(drop|truncate|delete|alter|rename)\s/i;
// P1-2: Safety limits for CH queries to prevent OOM/timeout at scale
const CH_QUERY_SAFETY = {
    max_execution_time: 10, // 10 seconds max per query
    max_rows_to_read: '100000000', // 100M rows max scan (string per CH client types)
};
function rowToJson(row) {
    const obj = {};
    for (const [key, val] of Object.entries(row)) {
        if (val instanceof cassandra_driver_1.types.Long)
            obj[key] = val.toString();
        else if (val instanceof Date)
            obj[key] = val.toISOString();
        else
            obj[key] = val;
    }
    return obj;
}
function dbRouter(scylla, ch) {
    const router = (0, express_1.Router)();
    //  ClickHouse: list tables 
    router.get('/ch/tables', async (_req, res) => {
        try {
            const r = await ch.query({
                query: `SELECT name, engine, total_rows FROM system.tables WHERE database = {db:String} ORDER BY total_rows DESC`,
                query_params: { db: CH_DB },
                format: 'JSONEachRow',
            });
            return res.json(await r.json());
        }
        catch (err) {
            return res.status(500).json({ error: err?.message });
        }
    });
    //  ClickHouse: table rows 
    router.get('/ch/tables/:table/rows', async (req, res) => {
        const limit = Math.min(parseInt(req.query['limit'] ?? '50'), 500);
        const offset = parseInt(req.query['offset'] ?? '0', 10);
        try {
            const r = await ch.query({
                query: `SELECT * FROM ${CH_DB}.${req.params.table} LIMIT {limit:UInt32} OFFSET {offset:UInt32}`,
                query_params: { limit, offset },
                format: 'JSONEachRow',
            });
            return res.json(await r.json());
        }
        catch (err) {
            return res.status(500).json({ error: err?.message });
        }
    });
    //  ClickHouse: run SQL 
    router.post('/ch/query', async (req, res) => {
        const { sql } = req.body;
        if (!sql?.trim())
            return res.status(400).json({ error: 'sql is required' });
        if (DESTRUCTIVE.test(sql) && req.headers['x-confirm-destructive'] !== 'yes')
            return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Destructive query  add X-Confirm-Destructive: yes' });
        const start = Date.now();
        try {
            const r = await ch.query({ query: sql, format: 'JSONEachRow', clickhouse_settings: CH_QUERY_SAFETY });
            const rows = await r.json();
            return res.json({ rows, count: rows.length, elapsedMs: Date.now() - start });
        }
        catch (err) {
            return res.status(500).json({ error: err?.message, elapsedMs: Date.now() - start });
        }
    });
    //  ClickHouse: analytics endpoints 
    router.get('/ch/analytics/topusers', async (req, res) => {
        const limit = Math.min(parseInt(req.query['limit'] ?? '20'), 100);
        try {
            const r = await ch.query({
                query: `SELECT author_id, author_name, count() AS msg_count, max(ts) AS last_seen
                FROM ${CH_DB}.messages
                WHERE ts >= now() - INTERVAL 90 DAY
                GROUP BY author_id, author_name
                ORDER BY msg_count DESC LIMIT {limit:UInt32}`,
                query_params: { limit }, format: 'JSONEachRow',
                clickhouse_settings: CH_QUERY_SAFETY,
            });
            return res.json(await r.json());
        }
        catch (err) {
            return res.status(500).json({ error: err?.message });
        }
    });
    router.get('/ch/analytics/topchannels', async (req, res) => {
        const limit = Math.min(parseInt(req.query['limit'] ?? '10'), 50);
        try {
            const r = await ch.query({
                query: `SELECT channel_id, count() AS msg_count, uniq(author_id) AS unique_users,
                       min(ts) AS first_msg, max(ts) AS last_msg
                FROM ${CH_DB}.messages
                WHERE ts >= now() - INTERVAL 90 DAY
                GROUP BY channel_id
                ORDER BY msg_count DESC LIMIT {limit:UInt32}`,
                query_params: { limit }, format: 'JSONEachRow',
                clickhouse_settings: CH_QUERY_SAFETY,
            });
            return res.json(await r.json());
        }
        catch (err) {
            return res.status(500).json({ error: err?.message });
        }
    });
    router.get('/ch/analytics/activity', async (req, res) => {
        const days = Math.min(parseInt(req.query['days'] ?? '30'), 90);
        try {
            const r = await ch.query({
                query: `SELECT toDate(ts) AS date, count() AS messages, uniq(author_id) AS users
                FROM ${CH_DB}.messages
                WHERE ts >= now() - INTERVAL {days:UInt32} DAY
                GROUP BY date ORDER BY date ASC`,
                query_params: { days }, format: 'JSONEachRow',
                clickhouse_settings: CH_QUERY_SAFETY,
            });
            return res.json(await r.json());
        }
        catch (err) {
            return res.status(500).json({ error: err?.message });
        }
    });
    router.get('/ch/analytics/hourly', async (_req, res) => {
        try {
            const r = await ch.query({
                query: `SELECT toHour(ts) AS hour, count() AS messages
                FROM ${CH_DB}.messages
                WHERE ts >= now() - INTERVAL 90 DAY
                GROUP BY hour ORDER BY hour ASC`,
                format: 'JSONEachRow',
                clickhouse_settings: CH_QUERY_SAFETY,
            });
            return res.json(await r.json());
        }
        catch (err) {
            return res.status(500).json({ error: err?.message });
        }
    });
    router.get('/ch/analytics/search', async (req, res) => {
        const q = (req.query['q'] ?? '').trim();
        const limit = Math.min(parseInt(req.query['limit'] ?? '50'), 200);
        if (!q)
            return res.status(400).json({ error: 'q is required' });
        try {
            const r = await ch.query({
                query: `SELECT message_id, channel_id, author_id, author_name, content, ts
                FROM ${CH_DB}.messages
                WHERE positionCaseInsensitive(content, {q:String}) > 0
                ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT {limit:UInt32}`,
                query_params: { q, limit }, format: 'JSONEachRow',
                clickhouse_settings: CH_QUERY_SAFETY,
            });
            const rows = await r.json();
            return res.json({ rows, count: rows.length });
        }
        catch (err) {
            return res.status(500).json({ error: err?.message });
        }
    });
    // ── ClickHouse: content type distribution (last N days) ──
    router.get('/ch/analytics/content-types', async (req, res) => {
        const days = Math.min(parseInt(req.query['days'] ?? '30'), 90);
        try {
            const r = await ch.query({
                query: `SELECT
                  countIf(has_attachment = 0 AND embed_count = 0 AND length(sticker_names) = 0) AS text_only,
                  countIf(has_attachment = 1) AS with_attachment,
                  countIf(embed_count > 0) AS with_embed,
                  countIf(length(sticker_names) > 0) AS with_sticker,
                  count() AS total
                FROM ${CH_DB}.messages
                WHERE ts >= now() - INTERVAL {days:UInt32} DAY`,
                query_params: { days }, format: 'JSONEachRow',
                clickhouse_settings: CH_QUERY_SAFETY,
            });
            const rows = await r.json();
            return res.json(rows[0] ?? {});
        }
        catch (err) {
            return res.status(500).json({ error: err?.message });
        }
    });
    // ── ClickHouse: media type breakdown (last N days) ──
    router.get('/ch/analytics/media-types', async (req, res) => {
        const days = Math.min(parseInt(req.query['days'] ?? '30'), 90);
        try {
            const r = await ch.query({
                query: `SELECT media_type, count() AS cnt
                FROM ${CH_DB}.messages
                WHERE ts >= now() - INTERVAL {days:UInt32} DAY
                GROUP BY media_type
                ORDER BY cnt DESC`,
                query_params: { days }, format: 'JSONEachRow',
                clickhouse_settings: CH_QUERY_SAFETY,
            });
            return res.json(await r.json());
        }
        catch (err) {
            return res.status(500).json({ error: err?.message });
        }
    });
    // ── ClickHouse: message size stats (avg, percentiles — last N days) ──
    router.get('/ch/analytics/msg-size', async (req, res) => {
        const days = Math.min(parseInt(req.query['days'] ?? '30'), 90);
        try {
            const r = await ch.query({
                query: `SELECT
                  round(avg(length(content))) AS avg_chars,
                  round(quantile(0.5)(length(content))) AS median_chars,
                  round(quantile(0.95)(length(content))) AS p95_chars,
                  max(length(content)) AS max_chars,
                  countIf(length(content) = 0) AS empty_count,
                  count() AS total
                FROM ${CH_DB}.messages
                WHERE ts >= now() - INTERVAL {days:UInt32} DAY`,
                query_params: { days }, format: 'JSONEachRow',
                clickhouse_settings: CH_QUERY_SAFETY,
            });
            const rows = await r.json();
            return res.json(rows[0] ?? {});
        }
        catch (err) {
            return res.status(500).json({ error: err?.message });
        }
    });
    // ── ClickHouse: user lookup by ID or name (global, uses PK where possible) ──
    router.get('/ch/analytics/user', async (req, res) => {
        const authorId = (req.query['authorId'] ?? '').trim();
        const name = (req.query['name'] ?? '').trim();
        const limit = Math.min(parseInt(req.query['limit'] ?? '20'), 100);
        if (!authorId && !name)
            return res.status(400).json({ error: 'authorId or name is required' });
        try {
            if (authorId && /^\d{17,20}$/.test(authorId)) {
                // Primary key lookup on users_latest — O(1), no scan
                const r = await ch.query({
                    query: `SELECT author_id, author_name, badge_mask, last_seen_ts, sample_guild
                  FROM ${CH_DB}.users_latest FINAL
                  WHERE author_id = {authorId:UInt64}`,
                    query_params: { authorId },
                    format: 'JSONEachRow',
                    clickhouse_settings: CH_QUERY_SAFETY,
                });
                const rows = await r.json();
                // Also get message count + first/last seen from messages
                const countR = await ch.query({
                    query: `SELECT count() AS msg_count, min(ts) AS first_seen, max(ts) AS last_seen
                  FROM ${CH_DB}.messages WHERE author_id = {authorId:UInt64}`,
                    query_params: { authorId },
                    format: 'JSONEachRow',
                    clickhouse_settings: CH_QUERY_SAFETY,
                });
                const [counts] = await countR.json();
                const user = rows[0] ?? null;
                return res.json({ user: user ? { ...user, ...counts } : null, found: !!user });
            }
            // Name search — uses positionCaseInsensitive (scan, but limited)
            if (name) {
                const r = await ch.query({
                    query: `SELECT author_id, author_name, badge_mask, last_seen_ts, sample_guild
                  FROM ${CH_DB}.users_latest FINAL
                  WHERE positionCaseInsensitive(author_name, {name:String}) > 0
                  ORDER BY last_seen_ts DESC LIMIT {limit:UInt32}`,
                    query_params: { name, limit },
                    format: 'JSONEachRow',
                    clickhouse_settings: CH_QUERY_SAFETY,
                });
                const rows = await r.json();
                return res.json({ users: rows, count: rows.length });
            }
            return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Invalid query' });
        }
        catch (err) {
            return res.status(500).json({ error: err?.message });
        }
    });
    //  ScyllaDB: list tables 
    router.get('/scylla/tables', async (_req, res) => {
        try {
            const r = await scylla.execute(`SELECT table_name FROM system_schema.tables WHERE keyspace_name = ?`, [KEYSPACE], { prepare: true });
            return res.json(r.rows.map(row => ({ name: row['table_name'] })));
        }
        catch (err) {
            return res.status(500).json({ error: err?.message });
        }
    });
    //  ScyllaDB: run CQL 
    router.post('/scylla/query', async (req, res) => {
        const { cql } = req.body;
        if (!cql?.trim())
            return res.status(400).json({ error: 'cql is required' });
        if (DESTRUCTIVE.test(cql) && req.headers['x-confirm-destructive'] !== 'yes')
            return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Destructive query  add X-Confirm-Destructive: yes' });
        const start = Date.now();
        try {
            const r = await scylla.execute(cql, [], { prepare: false });
            return res.json({ rows: r.rows.map(rowToJson), count: r.rowLength, elapsedMs: Date.now() - start });
        }
        catch (err) {
            return res.status(500).json({ error: err?.message, elapsedMs: Date.now() - start });
        }
    });
    return router;
}

const express_1 = require("express");
async function checkScylla(scylla) {
    const t = Date.now();
    try {
        await scylla.execute('SELECT now() FROM system.local');
        return { ok: true, latencyMs: Date.now() - t };
    }
    catch (err) {
        return { ok: false, error: err?.message ?? 'unknown' };
    }
}
async function checkClickHouse(ch) {
    const t = Date.now();
    try {
        const r = await ch.query({ query: 'SELECT 1', format: 'JSONEachRow' });
        await r.json();
        return { ok: true, latencyMs: Date.now() - t };
    }
    catch (err) {
        return { ok: false, error: err?.message ?? 'unknown' };
    }
}
async function checkKafka(brokers) {
    const t = Date.now();
    try {
        const { Kafka } = await Promise.resolve().then(() => __importStar(require('kafkajs')));
        const kafka = new Kafka({ clientId: 'senneo-health', brokers, retry: { retries: 1 } });
        const admin = kafka.admin();
        await admin.connect();
        await admin.listTopics();
        await admin.disconnect();
        return { ok: true, latencyMs: Date.now() - t };
    }
    catch (err) {
        return { ok: false, error: err?.message ?? 'unknown' };
    }
}
function healthRouter(scylla, ch, brokers) {
    const router = (0, express_1.Router)();
    // GET /health � simple liveness (load balancer ping)
    router.get('/', (_req, res) => {
        res.json({ status: 'ok', ts: new Date().toISOString() });
    });
    // GET /health/all � deep check of all services
    router.get('/all', async (_req, res) => {
        const [scyllaH, chH, kafkaH] = await Promise.all([
            checkScylla(scylla),
            checkClickHouse(ch),
            checkKafka(brokers),
        ]);
        const allOk = scyllaH.ok && chH.ok && kafkaH.ok;
        res.status(allOk ? 200 : 503).json({
            API: { ok: true, latencyMs: 0 },
            ScyllaDB: scyllaH,
            ClickHouse: chH,
            Kafka: kafkaH,
        });
    });
    return router;
}

import { Router } from 'express';
import { ClickHouseClient } from '@clickhouse/client';
import { Client as CassandraClient } from 'cassandra-driver';
export type ScrapePhase = 'done' | 'error' | 'active' | 'idle' | 'queued';
export declare function liveRouter(ch: ClickHouseClient, scylla: CassandraClient): Router;
//# sourceMappingURL=live.d.ts.map

"use strict";
Object.defineProperty(exports, "__esModule", { value: true });
exports.liveRouter = liveRouter;
const express_1 = require("express");
const CH_DB = process.env.CLICKHOUSE_DB ?? 'senneo';
const KEYSPACE = process.env.SCYLLA_KEYSPACE ?? 'senneo';
// P1-2: Safety limits for CH queries to prevent OOM/timeout at scale
const CH_QUERY_SAFETY = {
    max_execution_time: 10,
    max_rows_to_read: '100000000',
};
// P1 FIX #11+12: Single shared cache, refreshed by background timer
// SSE clients just read from cache  no more N3 queries/s
let _cache = null;
let _cacheTs = 0;
let _refreshTimer = null;
const REFRESH_INTERVAL = 1_000; // Refresh every 1s in background
/** Batched partition-key lookups — scales to large target lists without full-table scans */
const NAME_IN_CHUNK = 200;
async function fetchNamesByIds(scylla, ids) {
    const map = new Map();
    const uniq = [...new Set(ids)].filter(Boolean);
    for (let i = 0; i < uniq.length; i += NAME_IN_CHUNK) {
        const slice = uniq.slice(i, i + NAME_IN_CHUNK);
        const q = `SELECT id, name FROM ${KEYSPACE}.name_cache WHERE id IN (${slice.map(() => '?').join(',')})`;
        const result = await scylla.execute(q, slice);
        for (const row of result.rows)
            map.set(row['id'], String(row['name'] ?? ''));
    }
    return map;
}
/**
 * Scrape phase priority (single, deterministic order):
 *  1. complete=true → 'done'     (checkpoint is the single source of truth)
 *  2. msgsPerSec>0  → 'active'   (currently pulling messages)
 *  3. errors.length → 'error'    (has errors AND not complete AND not active)
 *  4. no data yet   → 'queued'   (hasn't started: 0 scraped, 0 progress)
 *  5. otherwise     → 'idle'     (has data/progress but not currently active — e.g. round-robin wait)
 */
function computeScrapePhase(c) {
    // 1. Single source of truth: checkpoint says done → done, period
    if (c.complete)
        return 'done';
    // 2. Currently active trumps stale errors
    if (c.msgsPerSec > 0)
        return 'active';
    // 3. Errors only matter if not complete and not active
    if (c.errors?.length > 0)
        return 'error';
    // 4. Never started
    if (c.totalScraped === 0 && (c.progress ?? 0) === 0)
        return 'queued';
    // 5. Has data but not currently active (waiting in queue, rate-limited, etc.)
    return 'idle';
}
async function buildStats(scylla) {
    try {
        const [statsResult, targetsResult, checkpointsResult] = await Promise.all([
            scylla.execute(`SELECT * FROM ${KEYSPACE}.scrape_stats`),
            scylla.execute(`SELECT channel_id, guild_id, label, account_idx FROM ${KEYSPACE}.scrape_targets`),
            scylla.execute(`SELECT channel_id, total_scraped, complete, newest_message_id, cursor_id FROM ${KEYSPACE}.scrape_checkpoints`),
        ]);
        const channels = {};
        let totalScraped = 0;
        let msgsPerSec = 0;
        const rateLimitLog = [];
        const targetByChannel = {};
        for (const row of targetsResult.rows) {
            const cid = row['channel_id'];
            targetByChannel[cid] = {
                guildId: row['guild_id'] ?? '',
                label: String(row['label'] ?? ''),
                accountIdx: row['account_idx'] != null ? Number(row['account_idx']) : undefined,
            };
        }
        const cpMap = {};
        for (const row of checkpointsResult.rows) {
            cpMap[row['channel_id']] = {
                totalScraped: Number(row['total_scraped'] ?? 0),
                complete: row['complete'] ?? false,
                newestId: row['newest_message_id'] ?? undefined,
                cursorId: row['cursor_id'] ?? undefined,
            };
        }
        const calcProgress = (channelId, cp) => {
            if (!cp)
                return 0;
            if (cp.complete)
                return 100;
            if (!cp.newestId || !cp.cursorId)
                return 0;
            if (cp.cursorId === cp.newestId)
                return 0;
            try {
                const newestMs = Number(BigInt(cp.newestId) >> 22n) + 1420070400000;
                const cursorMs = Number(BigInt(cp.cursorId) >> 22n) + 1420070400000;
                const channelMs = Number(BigInt(channelId) >> 22n) + 1420070400000;
                if (newestMs <= channelMs)
                    return 0;
                if (cursorMs >= newestMs)
                    return 0;
                if (cursorMs <= channelMs)
                    return 99;
                const totalRange = newestMs - channelMs;
                const scraped = newestMs - cursorMs;
                if (scraped <= 0 || totalRange <= 0)
                    return 0;
                const pct = Math.round((scraped / totalRange) * 100);
                return Math.max(0, Math.min(99, pct));
            }
            catch {
                return 0;
            }
        };
        const statsIds = new Set();
        for (const row of statsResult.rows) {
            const id = row['channel_id'];
            const statsTotal = Number(row['total_scraped'] ?? 0);
            const mps = Number(row['msgs_per_sec'] ?? 0);
            const rl = Number(row['rate_limit_hits'] ?? 0);
            const stComplete = Boolean(row['complete']);
            const cp = cpMap[id];
            const tgt = targetByChannel[id];
            const mergedComplete = stComplete || Boolean(cp?.complete);
            const prog = mergedComplete ? 100 : calcProgress(id, cp);
            // P2-A: Use max of stats and checkpoint totals so 'done' channels show real count
            const ts = Math.max(statsTotal, cp?.totalScraped ?? 0);
            statsIds.add(id);
            const accFromRow = row['account_idx'] != null ? Number(row['account_idx']) : undefined;
            channels[id] = {
                channelId: id,
                guildId: row['guild_id'] ?? tgt?.guildId ?? '',
                channelLabel: tgt?.label ?? '',
                totalScraped: ts,
                lastBatchSize: 100,
                msgsPerSec: mps,
                rateLimitHits: rl,
                errors: row['errors'] ?? [],
                lastUpdated: row['last_updated']?.toISOString() ?? '',
                complete: mergedComplete,
                accountIdx: accFromRow ?? tgt?.accountIdx,
                progress: prog,
            };
            totalScraped += ts;
            msgsPerSec += mps;
            if (rl > 0)
                rateLimitLog.push({ ts: row['last_updated']?.toISOString(), channelId: id, waitMs: 0 });
        }
        for (const row of targetsResult.rows) {
            const id = row['channel_id'];
            if (statsIds.has(id))
                continue;
            const cp = cpMap[id];
            const cpTotal = cp?.totalScraped ?? 0;
            const tgt = targetByChannel[id];
            const mergedComplete = Boolean(cp?.complete);
            const prog = mergedComplete ? 100 : calcProgress(id, cp);
            channels[id] = {
                channelId: id,
                guildId: row['guild_id'] ?? '',
                channelLabel: tgt?.label ?? '',
                totalScraped: cpTotal,
                lastBatchSize: 0,
                msgsPerSec: 0,
                rateLimitHits: 0,
                errors: [],
                lastUpdated: new Date().toISOString(),
                complete: mergedComplete,
                accountIdx: row['account_idx'] != null ? Number(row['account_idx']) : undefined,
                progress: prog,
            };
            totalScraped += cpTotal;
        }
        const nameIds = [];
        for (const ch of Object.values(channels)) {
            const gid = String(ch['guildId'] ?? '');
            const cid = String(ch['channelId'] ?? '');
            if (gid)
                nameIds.push(gid);
            if (cid)
                nameIds.push(cid);
        }
        const nameMap = await fetchNamesByIds(scylla, nameIds);
        const outChannels = {};
        for (const [id, ch] of Object.entries(channels)) {
            const guildId = String(ch['guildId'] ?? '');
            const channelLabel = String(ch['channelLabel'] ?? '');
            const guildName = nameMap.get(guildId) ?? '';
            const channelName = (() => {
                const raw = (nameMap.get(id) ?? channelLabel).trim();
                return raw || id;
            })();
            const msgs = Number(ch['msgsPerSec'] ?? 0);
            const ts = Number(ch['totalScraped'] ?? 0);
            const prog = Number(ch['progress'] ?? 0);
            const comp = Boolean(ch['complete']);
            const errs = ch['errors'] ?? [];
            const scrapePhase = computeScrapePhase({
                complete: comp,
                msgsPerSec: msgs,
                errors: errs,
                totalScraped: ts,
                progress: prog,
            });
            outChannels[id] = {
                ...ch,
                guildName,
                channelName,
                scrapePhase,
            };
        }
        return {
            startedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            totalScraped,
            msgsPerSec,
            channels: outChannels,
            rateLimitLog,
        };
    }
    catch {
        return _cache ?? { status: 'scraper_not_running', channels: {}, rateLimitLog: [] };
    }
}
function startRefresh(scylla) {
    if (_refreshTimer)
        return;
    // Initial fetch
    buildStats(scylla).then(s => { _cache = s; _cacheTs = Date.now(); }).catch(() => { });
    _refreshTimer = setInterval(async () => {
        try {
            _cache = await buildStats(scylla);
            _cacheTs = Date.now();
        }
        catch { /* keep stale cache */ }
    }, REFRESH_INTERVAL);
}
function getCachedChannels() {
    if (!_cache)
        return [];
    const ch = _cache['channels'];
    return ch ? Object.values(ch) : [];
}
function buildSummaryFromCache() {
    const all = getCachedChannels();
    const phaseCounts = { done: 0, active: 0, idle: 0, queued: 0, error: 0 };
    let totalScraped = 0, msgsPerSec = 0;
    const guildSet = new Set();
    for (const ch of all) {
        const phase = String(ch['scrapePhase'] ?? 'queued');
        phaseCounts[phase] = (phaseCounts[phase] ?? 0) + 1;
        totalScraped += Number(ch['totalScraped'] ?? 0);
        msgsPerSec += Number(ch['msgsPerSec'] ?? 0);
        const gid = String(ch['guildId'] ?? '');
        if (gid)
            guildSet.add(gid);
    }
    return {
        totalScraped,
        msgsPerSec,
        totalChannels: all.length,
        totalGuilds: guildSet.size,
        phaseCounts,
        updatedAt: _cache?.['updatedAt'] ?? new Date().toISOString(),
        startedAt: _cache?.['startedAt'] ?? new Date().toISOString(),
    };
}
function filterChannels(all, opts) {
    let filtered = all;
    // Phase filter
    if (opts.phase && opts.phase !== 'all') {
        filtered = filtered.filter(c => String(c['scrapePhase'] ?? '') === opts.phase);
    }
    // Guild filter
    if (opts.guildId) {
        filtered = filtered.filter(c => String(c['guildId'] ?? '') === opts.guildId);
    }
    // Account filter
    if (opts.accountIdx != null) {
        filtered = filtered.filter(c => Number(c['accountIdx'] ?? -1) === opts.accountIdx);
    }
    // Search (channel name, guild name, channel ID, guild ID)
    if (opts.q) {
        const q = opts.q.toLowerCase();
        filtered = filtered.filter(c => String(c['channelName'] ?? '').toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
            String(c['guildName'] ?? '').toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
            String(c['channelId'] ?? '').toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
            String(c['guildId'] ?? '').toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
            String(c['channelLabel'] ?? '').toLowerCase().includes(q));
    }
    const totalFiltered = filtered.length;
    // Sort with stable tie-breaking (guildId → channelId) to prevent row jumps on refresh
    const sortKey = opts.sort ?? 'msgsPerSec';
    const desc = !opts.sort?.startsWith('+');
    const key = sortKey.replace(/^[+-]/, '');
    filtered.sort((a, b) => {
        const av = a[key], bv = b[key];
        let cmp;
        if (typeof av === 'number' && typeof bv === 'number')
            cmp = desc ? bv - av : av - bv;
        else
            cmp = desc ? String(bv ?? '').localeCompare(String(av ?? '')) : String(av ?? '').localeCompare(String(bv ?? ''));
        if (cmp !== 0)
            return cmp;
        // Stable tie-break: guildId asc, then channelId asc
        const ga = String(a['guildId'] ?? ''), gb = String(b['guildId'] ?? '');
        if (ga !== gb)
            return ga.localeCompare(gb);
        return String(a['channelId'] ?? '').localeCompare(String(b['channelId'] ?? ''));
    });
    // Paginate
    const page = filtered.slice(opts.offset, opts.offset + opts.limit);
    return { channels: page, total: all.length, filtered: totalFiltered };
}
// ── Router ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function liveRouter(ch, scylla) {
    startRefresh(scylla);
    const router = (0, express_1.Router)();
    // Full cache (backwards compat) — avoid at 100K+ channels
    router.get('/', async (_req, res) => {
        if (!_cache)
            _cache = await buildStats(scylla);
        return res.json(_cache);
    });
    // ── GET /live/channels — server-side filter/search/pagination ────────────
    // Scales to 100K+ channels: dashboard fetches pages, not the full blob.
    router.get('/channels', (_req, res) => {
        const limit = Math.min(Math.max(parseInt(_req.query['limit'] ?? '50', 10) || 50, 1), 200);
        const offset = Math.max(parseInt(_req.query['offset'] ?? '0', 10) || 0, 0);
        const phase = _req.query['phase'];
        const guildId = _req.query['guildId'];
        const accountIdx = _req.query['accountIdx'] != null ? parseInt(_req.query['accountIdx'], 10) : undefined;
        const q = _req.query['q'];
        const sort = _req.query['sort'];
        const all = getCachedChannels();
        const result = filterChannels(all, { phase, guildId, accountIdx: Number.isFinite(accountIdx) ? accountIdx : undefined, q, sort, limit, offset });
        return res.json(result);
    });
    // ── GET /live/guilds — unique guilds with channel counts ─────────────────
    router.get('/guilds', (_req, res) => {
        const all = getCachedChannels();
        const guildMap = new Map();
        for (const ch of all) {
            const gid = String(ch['guildId'] ?? '');
            if (!gid)
                continue;
            const existing = guildMap.get(gid);
            if (!existing) {
                guildMap.set(gid, {
                    guildId: gid,
                    guildName: String(ch['guildName'] ?? ''),
                    channelCount: 1,
                    activeCount: ch['scrapePhase'] === 'active' ? 1 : 0,
                    totalScraped: Number(ch['totalScraped'] ?? 0),
                });
            }
            else {
                existing.channelCount++;
                if (ch['scrapePhase'] === 'active')
                    existing.activeCount++;
                existing.totalScraped += Number(ch['totalScraped'] ?? 0);
                if (!existing.guildName)
                    existing.guildName = String(ch['guildName'] ?? '');
            }
        }
        const guilds = [...guildMap.values()].sort((a, b) => b.totalScraped - a.totalScraped);
        return res.json({ guilds, total: guilds.length });
    });
    router.get('/ratelimits', (_req, res) => {
        return res.json(_cache?.['rateLimitLog'] ?? []);
    });
    router.get('/recent', async (req, res) => {
        const limit = Math.min(parseInt(req.query['limit'] ?? '20'), 100);
        const channelId = req.query['channelId'];
        const where = channelId ? 'WHERE channel_id = {channelId:UInt64}' : '';
        try {
            const result = await ch.query({
                query: `SELECT message_id, channel_id, guild_id, author_id, author_name,
                       nick, content, ts, badge_mask
                FROM ${CH_DB}.messages ${where}
                ORDER BY inserted_at DESC LIMIT {limit:UInt32}`,
                query_params: { ...(channelId ? { channelId } : {}), limit },
                format: 'JSONEachRow',
            });
            const rows = await result.json();
            return res.json({ messages: rows, count: rows.length });
        }
        catch (err) {
            console.error('[api] recent error:', err);
            return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal error' });
        }
    });
    // ── SSE: lightweight summary only (phase counts + totals) ───────────────
    // At 100K+ channels, streaming full channel list = 50MB+/s bandwidth.
    // Dashboard uses /live/channels REST for paginated channel data.
    router.get('/stream', (req, res) => {
        res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'text/event-stream');
        res.setHeader('Cache-Control', 'no-cache');
        res.setHeader('Connection', 'keep-alive');
        res.setHeader('X-Accel-Buffering', 'no');
        res.flushHeaders();
        const sendSummary = () => {
            const summary = buildSummaryFromCache();
            res.write(`data: ${JSON.stringify(summary)}\n\n`);
        };
        // Send immediately
        sendSummary();
        // Then push whenever cache updates
        let lastSent = _cacheTs;
        const interval = setInterval(() => {
            if (_cacheTs > lastSent) {
                sendSummary();
                lastSent = _cacheTs;
            }
        }, 500);
        const heartbeat = setInterval(() => res.write(': heartbeat\n\n'), 25_000);
        req.on('close', () => { clearInterval(interval); clearInterval(heartbeat); });
    });
    // ── GET /live/stream/full — legacy full SSE (opt-in, not default) ────────
    router.get('/stream/full', (req, res) => {
        res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'text/event-stream');
        res.setHeader('Cache-Control', 'no-cache');
        res.setHeader('Connection', 'keep-alive');
        res.setHeader('X-Accel-Buffering', 'no');
        res.flushHeaders();
        res.write(`data: ${JSON.stringify(_cache ?? { status: 'loading' })}\n\n`);
        let lastSent = _cacheTs;
        const interval = setInterval(() => {
            if (_cacheTs > lastSent) {
                res.write(`data: ${JSON.stringify(_cache)}\n\n`);
                lastSent = _cacheTs;
            }
        }, 500);
        const heartbeat = setInterval(() => res.write(': heartbeat\n\n'), 25_000);
        req.on('close', () => { clearInterval(interval); clearInterval(heartbeat); });
    });
    router.get('/summary', async (_req, res) => {
        try {
            const result = await ch.query({
                query: `SELECT count() AS db_total_messages, uniq(guild_id) AS db_total_guilds,
                       uniq(channel_id) AS db_total_channels, uniq(author_id) AS db_total_authors,
                       min(ts) AS oldest_ts, max(ts) AS newest_ts, max(inserted_at) AS last_insert_ts
                FROM ${CH_DB}.messages`,
                format: 'JSONEachRow',
                clickhouse_settings: CH_QUERY_SAFETY,
            });
            const [dbStats] = await result.json();
            return res.json({ database: dbStats ?? {}, scraper: buildSummaryFromCache() });
        }
        catch (err) {
            console.error('[api] summary error:', err);
            return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal error' });
        }
    });
    return router;
}

import { Router } from 'express';
import { Client as CassandraClient } from 'cassandra-driver';
import { ClickHouseClient } from '@clickhouse/client';
export declare function messagesRouter(scylla: CassandraClient, ch: ClickHouseClient): Router;

"use strict";
Object.defineProperty(exports, "__esModule", { value: true });
exports.messagesRouter = messagesRouter;
const express_1 = require("express");
const cassandra_driver_1 = require("cassandra-driver");
const KEYSPACE = process.env.SCYLLA_KEYSPACE ?? 'senneo';
const CH_DB = process.env.CLICKHOUSE_DB ?? 'senneo';
const BUCKET_MS = 86_400_000;
// P1-2: Safety limits for CH queries to prevent OOM/timeout at scale
const CH_QUERY_SAFETY = {
    max_execution_time: 10,
    max_rows_to_read: '100000000',
};
// ── Input validation helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
function isValidSnowflake(s) {
    return /^\d{17,20}$/.test(s);
}
function parseLimit(raw, defaultVal = 50, max = 1000) {
    const n = parseInt(String(raw ?? defaultVal), 10);
    return isNaN(n) ? defaultVal : Math.max(1, Math.min(n, max));
}
function isValidIso(s) {
    return !isNaN(Date.parse(s));
}
// ── Row serialiser (Long → string, Date → ISO) ───────────────────────────────
function rowToJson(row) {
    const obj = {};
    for (const [key, val] of Object.entries(row)) {
        if (val instanceof cassandra_driver_1.types.Long)
            obj[key] = val.toString();
        else if (val instanceof Date)
            obj[key] = val.toISOString();
        else
            obj[key] = val;
    }
    return obj;
}
function messagesRouter(scylla, ch) {
    const router = (0, express_1.Router)();
    // ── GET /messages/count ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
    router.get('/count', async (_req, res) => {
        try {
            const result = await ch.query({
                query: `
          SELECT
            count()          AS total_messages,
            uniq(author_id)  AS unique_users,
            uniq(channel_id) AS unique_channels,
            uniq(guild_id)   AS unique_guilds,
            min(ts)          AS oldest_message,
            max(ts)          AS newest_message
          FROM ${CH_DB}.messages
        `,
                format: 'JSONEachRow',
                clickhouse_settings: CH_QUERY_SAFETY,
            });
            const rows = await result.json();
            return res.json(rows[0] ?? {});
        }
        catch (err) {
            console.error('[api] count error:', err);
            return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal error' });
        }
    });
    // ── GET /messages/search ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
    router.get('/search', async (req, res) => {
        const { guildId, channelId, authorId, from, to, q } = req.query;
        const limit = parseLimit(req.query['limit'], 100, 1000);
        // Validate snowflake IDs
        for (const [name, val] of [['guildId', guildId], ['channelId', channelId], ['authorId', authorId]]) {
            if (val && !isValidSnowflake(val)) {
                return res.status(400).json({ error: `Invalid ${name} — must be a Discord snowflake` });
            }
        }
        // Validate dates
        for (const [name, val] of [['from', from], ['to', to]]) {
            if (val && !isValidIso(val)) {
                return res.status(400).json({ error: `Invalid ${name} — must be an ISO 8601 date` });
            }
        }
        const conditions = [];
        const params = {};
        if (guildId) {
            conditions.push('guild_id = {guildId:UInt64}');
            params['guildId'] = guildId;
        }
        if (channelId) {
            conditions.push('channel_id = {channelId:UInt64}');
            params['channelId'] = channelId;
        }
        if (authorId) {
            conditions.push('author_id = {authorId:UInt64}');
            params['authorId'] = authorId;
        }
        if (from) {
            conditions.push("ts >= {from:DateTime64(3,'UTC')}");
            params['from'] = from;
        }
        if (to) {
            conditions.push("ts <= {to:DateTime64(3,'UTC')}");
            params['to'] = to;
        }
        if (q) {
            conditions.push('positionCaseInsensitive(content, {q:String}) > 0');
            params['q'] = q;
        }
        const where = conditions.length > 0 ? `WHERE ${conditions.join(' AND ')}` : '';
        try {
            const result = await ch.query({
                query: `
          SELECT message_id, channel_id, guild_id, author_id, author_name,
                 nick, content, ts, badge_mask, has_attachment, embed_count
          FROM ${CH_DB}.messages ${where}
          ORDER BY ts DESC
          LIMIT {limit:UInt32}
        `,
                query_params: { ...params, limit },
                format: 'JSONEachRow',
            });
            const rows = await result.json();
            return res.json({ messages: rows, count: rows.length });
        }
        catch (err) {
            console.error('[api] search error:', err);
            return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal error' });
        }
    });
    // ── GET /messages/badges ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
    router.get('/badges', async (req, res) => {
        const { badgeMask } = req.query;
        if (!badgeMask)
            return res.status(400).json({ error: 'badgeMask is required' });
        if (!/^\d+$/.test(badgeMask))
            return res.status(400).json({ error: 'badgeMask must be a number' });
        const limit = parseLimit(req.query['limit'], 100, 1000);
        try {
            const result = await ch.query({
                query: `
          SELECT author_id, author_name, badge_mask, last_seen_ts, sample_guild
          FROM ${CH_DB}.users_latest FINAL
          WHERE bitAnd(badge_mask, {mask:UInt64}) = {mask:UInt64}
          ORDER BY last_seen_ts DESC
          LIMIT {limit:UInt32}
        `,
                query_params: { mask: badgeMask, limit },
                format: 'JSONEachRow',
            });
            const rows = await result.json();
            return res.json({ users: rows, count: rows.length });
        }
        catch (err) {
            console.error('[api] badges error:', err);
            return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal error' });
        }
    });
    // ── GET /messages/stats/:channelId ────────────────────────────────────────
    router.get('/stats/:channelId', async (req, res) => {
        const { channelId } = req.params;
        if (!isValidSnowflake(channelId))
            return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Invalid channelId' });
        try {
            const result = await ch.query({
                query: `
          SELECT
            date,
            message_count,
            unique_authors
          FROM ${CH_DB}.channel_daily_mv
          WHERE channel_id = {channelId:UInt64}
          ORDER BY date ASC
        `,
                query_params: { channelId },
                format: 'JSONEachRow',
            });
            const rows = await result.json();
            return res.json({ channelId, stats: rows });
        }
        catch (err) {
            // Fallback to raw table if MV isn't ready
            console.warn('[api] channel_daily_mv not ready, falling back to raw query');
            try {
                const result = await ch.query({
                    query: `
            SELECT toDate(ts) AS date, count() AS message_count, uniq(author_id) AS unique_authors
            FROM ${CH_DB}.messages
            WHERE channel_id = {channelId:UInt64}
            GROUP BY date ORDER BY date ASC
          `,
                    query_params: { channelId },
                    format: 'JSONEachRow',
                });
                const rows = await result.json();
                return res.json({ channelId, stats: rows });
            }
            catch (err2) {
                console.error('[api] stats error:', err2);
                return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal error' });
            }
        }
    });
    // ── GET /messages/author/:authorId ────────────────────────────────────────
    // NEW: find all messages by a specific author (uses Scylla messages_by_author)
    router.get('/author/:authorId', async (req, res) => {
        const { authorId } = req.params;
        if (!isValidSnowflake(authorId))
            return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Invalid authorId' });
        const limit = parseLimit(req.query['limit'], 50, 200);
        const beforeTs = req.query['before'] ? new Date(req.query['before']) : new Date();
        let bucket = Math.floor(beforeTs.getTime() / BUCKET_MS);
        try {
            const rows = [];
            while (rows.length < limit && bucket >= 0) {
                const result = await scylla.execute(`SELECT * FROM ${KEYSPACE}.messages_by_author
           WHERE author_id = ? AND bucket = ? AND ts < ?
           ORDER BY ts DESC, message_id DESC LIMIT ?`, [cassandra_driver_1.types.Long.fromString(authorId), bucket, beforeTs, limit - rows.length], { prepare: true });
                rows.push(...result.rows);
                bucket--;
                beforeTs.setTime(bucket * BUCKET_MS + BUCKET_MS);
            }
            return res.json({ messages: rows.map(rowToJson), count: rows.length });
        }
        catch (err) {
            console.error('[api] author lookup error:', err);
            return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal error' });
        }
    });
    // ── GET /messages/channel/:channelId  (cursor scroll via Scylla) ──────────
    router.get('/channel/:channelId', async (req, res) => {
        const { channelId } = req.params;
        if (!isValidSnowflake(channelId))
            return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Invalid channelId' });
        const limit = parseLimit(req.query['limit'], 50, 100);
        const beforeTs = req.query['before'] ? new Date(req.query['before']) : new Date();
        let bucket = Math.floor(beforeTs.getTime() / BUCKET_MS);
        try {
            const rows = [];
            let currentTs = new Date(beforeTs);
            while (rows.length < limit && bucket >= 0) {
                const result = await scylla.execute(`SELECT * FROM ${KEYSPACE}.messages_by_channel_bucket
           WHERE channel_id = ? AND bucket = ? AND ts < ?
           ORDER BY ts DESC, message_id DESC LIMIT ?`, [cassandra_driver_1.types.Long.fromString(channelId), bucket, currentTs, limit - rows.length], { prepare: true });
                rows.push(...result.rows);
                bucket--;
                currentTs = new Date(bucket * BUCKET_MS + BUCKET_MS);
            }
            const serialised = rows.map(rowToJson);
            const nextBefore = serialised.length > 0
                ? serialised[serialised.length - 1]['ts']
                : null;
            return res.json({
                messages: serialised,
                count: serialised.length,
                nextBefore, // Pagination cursor for the client
            });
        }
        catch (err) {
            console.error('[api] scroll error:', err);
            return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal error' });
        }
    });
    // ── GET /messages/:messageId  (point lookup — must be last) ──────────────
    router.get('/:messageId', async (req, res) => {
        const { messageId } = req.params;
        if (!isValidSnowflake(messageId))
            return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Invalid messageId' });
        try {
            const result = await scylla.execute(`SELECT * FROM ${KEYSPACE}.messages_by_id WHERE message_id = ?`, [cassandra_driver_1.types.Long.fromString(messageId)], { prepare: true });
            if (result.rowLength === 0)
                return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Message not found' });
            return res.json(rowToJson(result.first()));
        }
        catch (err) {
            console.error('[api] point lookup error:', err);
            return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal error' });
        }
    });
    return router;
}

import 'dotenv/config';
import path from 'path';
import express from 'express';
import { Client as CassandraClient, types as CassandraTypes } from 'cassandra-driver';
import { createClient as createClickHouseClient } from '@clickhouse/client';
import { messagesRouter } from './routes/messages';
import { liveRouter }     from './routes/live';
import { healthRouter }   from './routes/health';
import { accountsRouter } from './routes/accounts';
import { dbRouter }       from './routes/db';

const PORT         = parseInt(process.env.PORT          ?? '4000', 10);
const KEYSPACE     = process.env.SCYLLA_KEYSPACE        ?? 'senneo';
const SCYLLA_HOSTS = (process.env.SCYLLA_HOSTS          ?? 'localhost').split(',');
const CH_HOST      = process.env.CLICKHOUSE_HOST        ?? 'localhost';
const CH_PORT      = process.env.CLICKHOUSE_PORT        ?? '8123';
const CH_DB        = process.env.CLICKHOUSE_DB          ?? 'senneo';
const KAFKA_BROKERS = (process.env.KAFKA_BROKERS        ?? 'localhost:9092').split(',');

async function main(): Promise<void> {
  const scylla = new CassandraClient({
    contactPoints:   SCYLLA_HOSTS,
    localDataCenter: 'datacenter1',
    keyspace:        KEYSPACE,
    queryOptions: { consistency: CassandraTypes.consistencies.localOne },
    pooling: { coreConnectionsPerHost: { [CassandraTypes.distance.local]: 2 } },
  });
  await scylla.connect();
  console.log('[api] ScyllaDB connected');

  const ch = createClickHouseClient({
    host:     `http://${CH_HOST}:${CH_PORT}`,
    database: CH_DB,
  });
  console.log('[api] ClickHouse ready');

  const app = express();
  app.use(express.json());

  //  Static dashboard 
  app.use(express.static(path.join(__dirname, '../public')));

  // Redirect /  dashboard
  app.get('/', (_req, res) => res.redirect('/dashboard.html'));

  //  Routes 
  app.use('/health',   healthRouter(scylla, ch, KAFKA_BROKERS));
  app.use('/messages', messagesRouter(scylla, ch));
  app.use('/live', liveRouter(ch, scylla));
  app.use('/accounts', accountsRouter(scylla));
  app.use('/db',       dbRouter(scylla, ch));

  app.use((_req, res) => res.status(404).json({ error: 'Not found' }));

  app.listen(PORT, () => {
    console.log(`[api] Listening on http://0.0.0.0:${PORT}`);
    console.log(`[api] Dashboard  http://0.0.0.0:${PORT}/dashboard.html`);
  });

  const shutdown = async () => {
    await scylla.shutdown();
    process.exit(0);
  };
  process.on('SIGINT',  shutdown);
  process.on('SIGTERM', shutdown);
}

main().catch(err => { console.error('[api] Fatal:', err); process.exit(1); });

========================================================================
FILE: senneo/packages/api/src/routes/accounts.ts
SIZE: 18819
========================================================================
import { Router, Request, Response } from 'express';
import fs   from 'fs';
import path from 'path';
import https from 'https';
import { Client as CassandraClient } from 'cassandra-driver';

const KEYSPACE    = process.env.SCYLLA_KEYSPACE ?? 'senneo';
const ACCOUNTS_FILE = path.resolve(process.cwd(), 'accounts.json');
const ACC_COLORS    = ['#0a84ff','#32d74b','#bf5af2','#ff9f0a','#ff453a','#5e5ce6','#ff6b35','#30d158'];

// -- Accounts (still JSON  tokens should not go in DB) ----------------
function readAccounts(): { token: string }[] {
  try {
    if (!fs.existsSync(ACCOUNTS_FILE)) return [];
    return JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(ACCOUNTS_FILE, 'utf-8'))?.accounts ?? [];
  } catch { return []; }
}

function writeAccounts(accounts: { token: string }[]): void {
  fs.writeFileSync(ACCOUNTS_FILE, JSON.stringify({ accounts }, null, 2));
}

// -- Targets via ScyllaDB ----------------------------------------------
export interface ScrapeTarget {
  guildId: string; channelId: string; label?: string;
}

async function readTargets(db: CassandraClient): Promise<(ScrapeTarget & { accountIdx?: number })[]> {
  const result = await db.execute(`SELECT * FROM ${KEYSPACE}.scrape_targets`);
  return result.rows.map(row => ({
    channelId:  row['channel_id'],
    guildId:    row['guild_id']   ?? '',
    label:      row['label']      ?? undefined,
    accountIdx: row['account_idx'] != null ? Number(row['account_idx']) : undefined,
  }));
}

async function addTarget(db: CassandraClient, t: ScrapeTarget & { accountIdx?: number }): Promise<void> {
  await db.execute(
    `INSERT INTO ${KEYSPACE}.scrape_targets (channel_id, guild_id, label, account_idx, created_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?)`,
    [t.channelId, t.guildId, t.label ?? '', t.accountIdx ?? null, new Date()],
  );
}

async function deleteTarget(db: CassandraClient, channelId: string): Promise<void> {
  await db.execute(`DELETE FROM ${KEYSPACE}.scrape_targets WHERE channel_id = ?`, [channelId]);
}

// -- Name cache via ScyllaDB -------------------------------------------
async function readNames(db: CassandraClient): Promise<Record<string, string>> {
  const result = await db.execute(`SELECT id, name FROM ${KEYSPACE}.name_cache`);
  const out: Record<string, string> = {};
  result.rows.forEach(row => { out[row['id']] = row['name']; });
  return out;
}

async function saveNames(db: CassandraClient, names: Record<string, string>): Promise<void> {
  await Promise.all(
    Object.entries(names).map(([id, name]) =>
      db.execute(
        `INSERT INTO ${KEYSPACE}.name_cache (id, name, kind) VALUES (?,?,?)`,
        [id, name, id.length > 18 ? 'channel' : 'guild'],
      )
    )
  );
}

// -- Discord API -------------------------------------------------------
function maskToken(token: string): string {
  if (token.length < 20) return '';
  return token.slice(0, 10) + '' + token.slice(-4);
}

function discordGet(endpoint: string, token: string): Promise<unknown> {
  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    const req = https.request({
      hostname: 'discord.com',
      path:     `/api/v10${endpoint}`,
      method:   'GET',
      headers: {
        'Authorization': token,
        'User-Agent':    'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64)',
        'Content-Type':  'application/json',
      },
    }, (res) => {
      let data = '';
      res.on('data', (c: Buffer) => data += c.toString());
      res.on('end', () => { try { resolve(JSON.parse(data)); } catch { reject(new Error('parse error')); } });
    });
    req.on('error', reject);
    req.setTimeout(8000, () => { req.destroy(); reject(new Error('timeout')); });
    req.end();
  });
}

interface DiscordUser  { id: string; username: string; discriminator: string; global_name?: string; avatar?: string; }
interface DiscordGuild { id: string; name: string; icon: string | null; }

const _cache: Record<string, { ts: number; user?: DiscordUser; guilds?: DiscordGuild[]; error?: string }> = {};
const TTL = 15_000;

async function fetchAccountInfo(token: string, idx: number, assignedTargets: ScrapeTarget[]) {
  const key = token.slice(-16);
  const now = Date.now();
  const hit = _cache[key];
  let user: DiscordUser | undefined;
  let guilds: DiscordGuild[] = [];
  let error: string | undefined;

  if (hit && now - hit.ts < TTL) {
    user = hit.user; guilds = hit.guilds ?? []; error = hit.error;
  } else {
    try {
      const [uRes, gRes] = await Promise.allSettled([
        discordGet('/users/@me', token),
        discordGet('/users/@me/guilds', token),
      ]);
      if (uRes.status === 'fulfilled') {
        const u = uRes.value as DiscordUser & { message?: string };
        if (u.id) user = u; else error = u.message ?? 'Geçersiz token';
      }
      if (gRes.status === 'fulfilled' && Array.isArray(gRes.value)) {
        guilds = (gRes.value as DiscordGuild[])
          .map(g => ({ id: g.id, name: g.name, icon: g.icon }))
          .sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
      }
      _cache[key] = { ts: now, user, guilds, error };
    } catch (e: unknown) {
      error = e instanceof Error ? e.message : 'Baglanti hatasi';
      _cache[key] = { ts: now, error };
    }
  }
  return { idx, tokenMasked: maskToken(token), color: ACC_COLORS[idx % ACC_COLORS.length], user, guilds, error, targets: assignedTargets };
}

function distribute(targets: ScrapeTarget[], n: number): Map<number, ScrapeTarget[]> {
  const map = new Map<number, ScrapeTarget[]>();
  for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) map.set(i, []);
  targets.forEach((t, i) => map.get(i % n)!.push(t));
  return map;
}

// -- Router factory ----------------------------------------------------
export function accountsRouter(db: CassandraClient): Router {
  const router = Router();

  router.get('/', async (_req: Request, res: Response) => {
    const accounts = readAccounts();
    const targets  = await readTargets(db);
    const names    = await readNames(db);
    const n        = Math.max(accounts.length, 1);

    // Hesap basina kanal listesi  DB'deki gerçek atamaya göre
    const assignedByAcc = new Map<number, typeof targets>();
    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) assignedByAcc.set(i, []);
    targets.forEach(t => {
      const idx = t.accountIdx ?? (targets.indexOf(t) % n);
      assignedByAcc.get(idx % n)?.push(t);
    });

    const infos = await Promise.all(
      accounts.map((a, i) => fetchAccountInfo(a.token, i, assignedByAcc.get(i) ?? []))
    );

    const enriched = targets.map(t => ({ ...t, channelName: t.label || names[t.channelId] || null }));
    infos.forEach(info => {
      info.targets = info.targets.map(t => ({ ...t, channelName: t.label || names[t.channelId] || null }));
    });

    return res.json({
      accounts: infos, targets: enriched,
      totalAccounts: accounts.length,
      totalTargets:  targets.length,
      totalGuilds:   new Set(targets.map(t => t.guildId)).size,
    });
  });

  router.post('/', (req: Request, res: Response) => {
    const { token } = req.body as { token?: string };
    if (!token?.trim()) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Token bos olamaz' });
    const accounts = readAccounts();
    if (accounts.some(a => a.token === token.trim())) return res.status(409).json({ error: 'Bu token zaten ekli' });
    accounts.push({ token: token.trim() });
    writeAccounts(accounts);
    delete _cache[token.trim().slice(-16)];
    return res.json({ ok: true, total: accounts.length });
  });

  router.get('/guild/:guildId/info', async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  const { guildId } = req.params;
  const accIdx = Number(req.query.accIdx ?? 0);
  const accounts = readAccounts();
  const token = accounts[accIdx]?.token;
  if (!token) return res.json(null);
  try {
    const r = await fetch(`https://discord.com/api/v10/guilds/${guildId}`, {
      headers: { Authorization: token }
    });
    if (!r.ok) return res.json(null);
    const g = await r.json() as { id: string; name: string; icon: string | null };
    res.json({ id: g.id, name: g.name, icon: g.icon });
  } catch {
    res.json(null);
  }
});

  router.delete('/:idx', (req: Request, res: Response) => {
    const idx = parseInt(req.params.idx, 10);
    const accounts = readAccounts();
    if (isNaN(idx) || idx < 0 || idx >= accounts.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Hesap bulunamadi' });
    accounts.splice(idx, 1);
    writeAccounts(accounts);
    return res.json({ ok: true, total: accounts.length });
  });

  router.get('/targets', async (_req: Request, res: Response) => {
    return res.json(await readTargets(db));
  });

  router.post('/targets', async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
    const { guildId, channelId, label } = req.body as Record<string, string>;
    if (!guildId?.trim() || !channelId?.trim()) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'guildId ve channelId zorunlu' });
    if (!/^\d{17,20}$/.test(guildId) || !/^\d{17,20}$/.test(channelId)) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Geçersiz Discord Snowflake' });

    // Discord API'den kanali dogrula  gerçek guild_id'yi al
    const accounts = readAccounts();
    if (!accounts.length) return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Hesap yok' });

    let realGuildId = guildId;
    let channelName: string | undefined;
    for (const acc of accounts) {
      try {
        const ch = await discordGet(`/channels/${channelId}`, acc.token) as { guild_id?: string; name?: string; message?: string };
        if (ch.guild_id) {
          realGuildId  = ch.guild_id;
          channelName  = ch.name;
          if (realGuildId !== guildId) {
            console.warn(`[accounts] Guild ID düzeltildi: ${guildId} ? ${realGuildId} (kanal: ${channelId})`);
          }
          break;
        }
      } catch { /* sonraki hesabi dene */ }
    }

    const targets = await readTargets(db);
    if (targets.some(t => t.channelId === channelId)) return res.status(409).json({ error: 'Bu kanal zaten eklendi' });

    await addTarget(db, { guildId: realGuildId, channelId: channelId.trim(), label: label?.trim() || undefined });

    // Guild-aware account_idx: o guild'de olan hesabi bul ve yaz
    // (scraper baslayinca zaten dogru hesaba verilecek, ama buradan da set edelim)
    try {
      const allAccounts = readAccounts();
      // Her hesabin guild listesini cache'den al
      const guildsPerAcc = await Promise.all(allAccounts.map(async (acc, idx) => {
        try {
          const guilds = await discordGet('/users/@me/guilds', acc.token) as Array<{ id: string }>;
          return { idx, guildIds: new Set(Array.isArray(guilds) ? guilds.map(g => g.id) : []) };
        } catch { return { idx, guildIds: new Set<string>() }; }
      }));
      const eligible = guildsPerAcc.filter(a => a.guildIds.has(realGuildId));
      if (eligible.length > 0) {
        // Mevcut target sayisina göre round-robin
        const existing = await readTargets(db);
        const sameGuildTargets = existing.filter(t => t.guildId === realGuildId);
        const picked = eligible[sameGuildTargets.length % eligible.length];
        await db.execute(
          `UPDATE ${KEYSPACE}.scrape_targets SET account_idx = ? WHERE channel_id = ?`,
          [picked.idx, channelId.trim()]
        );
      } else {
        console.warn(`[accounts] Guild ${realGuildId} için uygun hesap yok`);
      }
    } catch (err) {
      console.warn('[accounts] account_idx atamasi basarisiz (non-fatal):', err);
    }

    // Kanal adini name_cache'e kaydet
    if (channelName) {
      await db.execute(
        `INSERT INTO ${KEYSPACE}.name_cache (id, name, kind) VALUES (?,?,?)`,
        [channelId, channelName, 'channel']
      ).catch(() => {});
    }

    return res.json({ ok: true, total: targets.length + 1, realGuildId });
  });

  router.delete('/targets/:channelId', async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
    const targets = await readTargets(db);
    if (!targets.some(t => t.channelId === req.params.channelId)) return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Kanal bulunamadi' });
    await deleteTarget(db, req.params.channelId);
    return res.json({ ok: true, total: targets.length - 1 });
  });

  // POST /accounts/fix-guild-ids  mevcut tüm kanallarin guild_id'sini Discord'dan dogrula
  router.post('/fix-guild-ids', async (_req: Request, res: Response) => {
    const accounts = readAccounts();
    if (!accounts.length) return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Hesap yok' });
    const targets = await readTargets(db);
    const fixed: string[] = [];
    const errors: string[] = [];

    for (const target of targets) {
      for (const acc of accounts) {
        try {
          const ch = await discordGet(`/channels/${target.channelId}`, acc.token) as { guild_id?: string; name?: string };
          if (ch.guild_id) {
            if (ch.guild_id !== target.guildId) {
              await db.execute(
                `UPDATE ${KEYSPACE}.scrape_targets SET guild_id = ? WHERE channel_id = ?`,
                [ch.guild_id, target.channelId]
              );
              fixed.push(`${target.channelId}: ${target.guildId} ? ${ch.guild_id}`);
            }
            if (ch.name) {
              await db.execute(
                `INSERT INTO ${KEYSPACE}.name_cache (id, name, kind) VALUES (?,?,?)`,
                [target.channelId, ch.name, 'channel']
              );
            }
            break;
          }
        } catch (e: unknown) {
          errors.push(`${target.channelId}: ${e instanceof Error ? e.message : 'hata'}`);
        }
      }
    }
    return res.json({ fixed, errors, total: targets.length });
  });

  router.post('/refresh-cache', (_req: Request, res: Response) => {
    Object.keys(_cache).forEach(k => delete _cache[k]);
    return res.json({ ok: true });
  });

  router.get('/status', (_req: Request, res: Response) => {
    const PID_FILE = path.join(process.cwd(), '.pids', 'accounts.pid');
    try {
      if (!fs.existsSync(PID_FILE)) return res.json({ running: false });
      const pid = parseInt(fs.readFileSync(PID_FILE, 'utf-8').trim(), 10);
      if (isNaN(pid)) return res.json({ running: false });
      process.kill(pid, 0);
      return res.json({ running: true, pid });
    } catch { return res.json({ running: false }); }
  });

  // GET /accounts/guild/:guildId/channels
  router.get('/guild/:guildId/channels', async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
    const { guildId } = req.params;
    const accIdx = parseInt(req.query['accIdx'] as string ?? '0', 10);
    if (!/^\d{17,20}$/.test(guildId)) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Geçersiz guildId' });
    const accounts = readAccounts();
    if (!accounts[accIdx]) return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Hesap bulunamadi' });

    try {
      const [channelsRes, rolesRes, memberRes] = await Promise.allSettled([
        discordGet(`/guilds/${guildId}/channels`, accounts[accIdx].token),
        discordGet(`/guilds/${guildId}/roles`, accounts[accIdx].token),
        discordGet(`/guilds/${guildId}/members/@me`, accounts[accIdx].token),
      ]);

      type DiscordChannel = {
        id: string; name: string; type: number; position: number;
        last_message_id?: string | null; parent_id?: string | null;
        permission_overwrites?: Array<{ id: string; type: number; deny: string; allow: string }>;
      };
      type DiscordRole = { id: string; name: string; permissions: string; managed: boolean; position: number };
      type Overwrite   = { id: string; type: number; deny: string; allow: string };

      const channels = channelsRes.status === 'fulfilled' ? channelsRes.value as DiscordChannel[] : null;
      if (!Array.isArray(channels)) return res.status(403).json({ error: 'Kanallar alinamadi' });

      const allRoles: DiscordRole[] = rolesRes.status === 'fulfilled' && Array.isArray(rolesRes.value)
        ? rolesRes.value as DiscordRole[] : [];

      // Hesabin sahip oldugu rol ID'leri
      const memberRoleIds = new Set<string>([guildId]); // @everyone her zaman dahil
      if (memberRes.status === 'fulfilled') {
        const member = memberRes.value as { roles?: string[] };
        (member.roles ?? []).forEach(r => memberRoleIds.add(r));
      }

      // Hesabin sahip oldugu rollerin objeleri
      const myRoles = allRoles.filter(r => memberRoleIds.has(r.id));

      // Temel izinler (tüm rollerden birlesik)
      const VIEW = 1024n;
      const ADMIN = 8n;
      const basePerms = myRoles.reduce((acc, r) => acc | BigInt(r.permissions ?? '0'), 0n);
      const isAdmin = (basePerms & ADMIN) !== 0n;

      function canAccess(c: DiscordChannel): boolean {
        if (isAdmin) return true; // Admin her seyi görür

        let perms = basePerms;

        // Permission overwrites uygula
        const ows = c.permission_overwrites ?? [];

        // Önce @everyone overwrite
        const everyoneOw = ows.find((o: Overwrite) => o.id === guildId && o.type === 0);
        if (everyoneOw) {
          perms &= ~BigInt(everyoneOw.deny  ?? '0');
          perms |=  BigInt(everyoneOw.allow ?? '0');
        }

        // Sonra hesabin rollerinin overwrites'lari
        let roleAllow = 0n, roleDeny = 0n;
        for (const ow of ows) {
          if (ow.type === 0 && memberRoleIds.has(ow.id) && ow.id !== guildId) {
            roleAllow |= BigInt(ow.allow ?? '0');
            roleDeny  |= BigInt(ow.deny  ?? '0');
          }
        }
        perms &= ~roleDeny;
        perms |=  roleAllow;

        return (perms & VIEW) !== 0n;
      }

      const TEXT_TYPES = new Set([0, 5, 10, 11, 12]);
      const targets = await readTargets(db);
      const existing = new Set(targets.map(t => t.channelId));

      const result = channels
        .filter(c => TEXT_TYPES.has(c.type))
        .filter(c => canAccess(c))
        .map(c => ({
          id: c.id, name: c.name, type: c.type,
          lastActivity: c.last_message_id
            ? Number(BigInt(c.last_message_id) >> 22n) + 1420070400000 : 0,
          alreadyAdded: existing.has(c.id),
        }))
        .sort((a, b) => b.lastActivity - a.lastActivity)
        .slice(0, 10); // Top 10

      // Kanal isimlerini cache'e kaydet
      const namesToSave: Record<string, string> = {};
      result.forEach(c => { namesToSave[c.id] = c.name; });
      await saveNames(db, namesToSave).catch(() => {});

      return res.json(result);
    } catch (err: unknown) {
      return res.status(500).json({ error: err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Hata' });
    }
  });

  return router;
}

FILE: senneo/packages/api/src/routes/db.ts
